2859			/* ALTER TABLE <name> ENABLE REPLICA RULE <rule> */
2860			| ENABLE_P REPLICA RULE name
2861				{
2862					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2863
2864					n->subtype = AT_EnableReplicaRule;
2865					n->name = $4;
2866					$$ = (Node *) n;
2867				}
2868			/* ALTER TABLE <name> DISABLE RULE <rule> */
2869			| DISABLE_P RULE name
2870				{
2871					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2872
2873					n->subtype = AT_DisableRule;
2874					n->name = $3;
2875					$$ = (Node *) n;
2876				}
2877			/* ALTER TABLE <name> INHERIT <parent> */
2878			| INHERIT qualified_name
2879				{
2880					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2881
2882					n->subtype = AT_AddInherit;
2883					n->def = (Node *) $2;
2884					$$ = (Node *) n;
2885				}
2886			/* ALTER TABLE <name> NO INHERIT <parent> */
2887			| NO INHERIT qualified_name
2888				{
2889					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2890
2891					n->subtype = AT_DropInherit;
2892					n->def = (Node *) $3;
2893					$$ = (Node *) n;
2894				}
2895			/* ALTER TABLE <name> OF <type_name> */
2896			| OF any_name
2897				{
2898					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2899					TypeName   *def = makeTypeNameFromNameList($2);
2900
2901					def->location = @2;
2902					n->subtype = AT_AddOf;
2903					n->def = (Node *) def;
2904					$$ = (Node *) n;
2905				}
2906			/* ALTER TABLE <name> NOT OF */
2907			| NOT OF
2908				{
2909					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2910
2911					n->subtype = AT_DropOf;
2912					$$ = (Node *) n;
2913				}
2914			/* ALTER TABLE <name> OWNER TO RoleSpec */
2915			| OWNER TO RoleSpec
2916				{
2917					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2918
2919					n->subtype = AT_ChangeOwner;
2920					n->newowner = $3;
2921					$$ = (Node *) n;
2922				}
2923			/* ALTER TABLE <name> SET ACCESS METHOD { <amname> | DEFAULT } */
2924			| SET ACCESS METHOD set_access_method_name
2925				{
2926					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2927
2928					n->subtype = AT_SetAccessMethod;
2929					n->name = $4;
2930					$$ = (Node *) n;
2931				}
2932			/* ALTER TABLE <name> SET TABLESPACE <tablespacename> */
2933			| SET TABLESPACE name
2934				{
2935					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2936
2937					n->subtype = AT_SetTableSpace;
2938					n->name = $3;
2939					$$ = (Node *) n;
2940				}
2941			/* ALTER TABLE <name> SET (...) */
2942			| SET reloptions
2943				{
2944					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2945
2946					n->subtype = AT_SetRelOptions;
2947					n->def = (Node *) $2;
2948					$$ = (Node *) n;
2949				}
2950			/* ALTER TABLE <name> RESET (...) */
2951			| RESET reloptions
2952				{
2953					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2954
2955					n->subtype = AT_ResetRelOptions;
2956					n->def = (Node *) $2;
2957					$$ = (Node *) n;
2958				}
2959			/* ALTER TABLE <name> REPLICA IDENTITY */
2960			| REPLICA IDENTITY_P replica_identity
2961				{
2962					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2963
2964					n->subtype = AT_ReplicaIdentity;
2965					n->def = $3;
2966					$$ = (Node *) n;
2967				}
2968			/* ALTER TABLE <name> ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY */
2969			| ENABLE_P ROW LEVEL SECURITY
2970				{
2971					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2972
2973					n->subtype = AT_EnableRowSecurity;
2974					$$ = (Node *) n;
2975				}
2976			/* ALTER TABLE <name> DISABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY */
2977			| DISABLE_P ROW LEVEL SECURITY
2978				{
2979					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2980
2981					n->subtype = AT_DisableRowSecurity;
2982					$$ = (Node *) n;
2983				}
2984			/* ALTER TABLE <name> FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY */
2985			| FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY
2986				{
2987					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2988
2989					n->subtype = AT_ForceRowSecurity;
2990					$$ = (Node *) n;
2991				}
2992			/* ALTER TABLE <name> NO FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY */
2993			| NO FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY
2994				{
2995					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
2996
2997					n->subtype = AT_NoForceRowSecurity;
2998					$$ = (Node *) n;
2999				}
3000			| alter_generic_options
3001				{
3002					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
3003
3004					n->subtype = AT_GenericOptions;
3005					n->def = (Node *) $1;
3006					$$ = (Node *) n;
3007				}
3008		;
3009
3010alter_column_default:
3011			SET DEFAULT a_expr			{ $$ = $3; }
3012			| DROP DEFAULT				{ $$ = NULL; }
3013		;
3014
3015opt_collate_clause:
3016			COLLATE any_name
3017				{
3018					CollateClause *n = makeNode(CollateClause);
3019
3020					n->arg = NULL;
3021					n->collname = $2;
3022					n->location = @1;
3023					$$ = (Node *) n;
3024				}
3025			| /* EMPTY */				{ $$ = NULL; }
3026		;
3027
3028alter_using:
3029			USING a_expr				{ $$ = $2; }
3030			| /* EMPTY */				{ $$ = NULL; }
3031		;
3032
3033replica_identity:
3034			NOTHING
3035				{
3036					ReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);
3037
3038					n->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_NOTHING;
3039					n->name = NULL;
3040					$$ = (Node *) n;
3041				}
3042			| FULL
3043				{
3044					ReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);
3045
3046					n->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_FULL;
3047					n->name = NULL;
3048					$$ = (Node *) n;
3049				}
3050			| DEFAULT
3051				{
3052					ReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);
3053
3054					n->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_DEFAULT;
3055					n->name = NULL;
3056					$$ = (Node *) n;
3057				}
3058			| USING INDEX name
3059				{
3060					ReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);
3061
3062					n->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_INDEX;
3063					n->name = $3;
3064					$$ = (Node *) n;
3065				}
3066;
3067
3068reloptions:
3069			'(' reloption_list ')'					{ $$ = $2; }
3070		;
3071
3072opt_reloptions:		WITH reloptions					{ $$ = $2; }
3073			 |		/* EMPTY */						{ $$ = NIL; }
3074		;
3075
3076reloption_list:
3077			reloption_elem							{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
3078			| reloption_list ',' reloption_elem		{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
3079		;
3080
3081/* This should match def_elem and also allow qualified names */
3082reloption_elem:
3083			ColLabel '=' def_arg
3084				{
3085					$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $3, @1);
3086				}
3087			| ColLabel
3088				{
3089					$$ = makeDefElem($1, NULL, @1);
3090				}
3091			| ColLabel '.' ColLabel '=' def_arg
3092				{
3093					$$ = makeDefElemExtended($1, $3, (Node *) $5,
3094											 DEFELEM_UNSPEC, @1);
3095				}
3096			| ColLabel '.' ColLabel
3097				{
3098					$$ = makeDefElemExtended($1, $3, NULL, DEFELEM_UNSPEC, @1);
3099				}
3100		;
3101
3102alter_identity_column_option_list:
3103			alter_identity_column_option
3104				{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
3105			| alter_identity_column_option_list alter_identity_column_option
3106				{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
3107		;
3108
3109alter_identity_column_option:
3110			RESTART
3111				{
3112					$$ = makeDefElem("restart", NULL, @1);
3113				}
3114			| RESTART opt_with NumericOnly
3115				{
3116					$$ = makeDefElem("restart", (Node *) $3, @1);
3117				}
3118			| SET SeqOptElem
3119				{
3120					if (strcmp($2->defname, "as") == 0 ||
3121						strcmp($2->defname, "restart") == 0 ||
3122						strcmp($2->defname, "owned_by") == 0)
3123						ereport(ERROR,
3124								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
3125								 errmsg("sequence option \"%s\" not supported here", $2->defname),
3126								 parser_errposition(@2)));
3127					$$ = $2;
3128				}
3129			| SET GENERATED generated_when
3130				{
3131					$$ = makeDefElem("generated", (Node *) makeInteger($3), @1);
3132				}
3133		;
3134
3135set_statistics_value:
3136			SignedIconst					{ $$ = (Node *) makeInteger($1); }
3137			| DEFAULT						{ $$ = NULL; }
3138		;
3139
3140set_access_method_name:
3141			ColId							{ $$ = $1; }
3142			| DEFAULT						{ $$ = NULL; }
3143		;
3144
3145PartitionBoundSpec:
3146			/* a HASH partition */
3147			FOR VALUES WITH '(' hash_partbound ')'
3148				{
3149					ListCell   *lc;
3150					PartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);
3151
3152					n->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_HASH;
3153					n->modulus = n->remainder = -1;
3154
3155					foreach (lc, $5)
3156					{
3157						DefElem    *opt = lfirst_node(DefElem, lc);
3158
3159						if (strcmp(opt->defname, "modulus") == 0)
3160						{
3161							if (n->modulus != -1)
3162								ereport(ERROR,
3163										(errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_OBJECT),
3164										 errmsg("modulus for hash partition provided more than once"),
3165										 parser_errposition(opt->location)));
3166							n->modulus = defGetInt32(opt);
3167						}
3168						else if (strcmp(opt->defname, "remainder") == 0)
3169						{
3170							if (n->remainder != -1)
3171								ereport(ERROR,
3172										(errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_OBJECT),
3173										 errmsg("remainder for hash partition provided more than once"),
3174										 parser_errposition(opt->location)));
3175							n->remainder = defGetInt32(opt);
3176						}
3177						else
3178							ereport(ERROR,
3179									(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
3180									 errmsg("unrecognized hash partition bound specification \"%s\"",
3181											opt->defname),
3182									 parser_errposition(opt->location)));
3183					}
3184
3185					if (n->modulus == -1)
3186						ereport(ERROR,
3187								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
3188								 errmsg("modulus for hash partition must be specified"),
3189								 parser_errposition(@3)));
3190					if (n->remainder == -1)
3191						ereport(ERROR,
3192								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
3193								 errmsg("remainder for hash partition must be specified"),
3194								 parser_errposition(@3)));
3195
3196					n->location = @3;
3197
3198					$$ = n;
3199				}
3200
3201			/* a LIST partition */
3202			| FOR VALUES IN_P '(' expr_list ')'
3203				{
3204					PartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);
3205
3206					n->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_LIST;
3207					n->is_default = false;
3208					n->listdatums = $5;
3209					n->location = @3;
3210
3211					$$ = n;
3212				}
3213
3214			/* a RANGE partition */
3215			| FOR VALUES FROM '(' expr_list ')' TO '(' expr_list ')'
3216				{
3217					PartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);
3218
3219					n->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_RANGE;
3220					n->is_default = false;
3221					n->lowerdatums = $5;
3222					n->upperdatums = $9;
3223					n->location = @3;
3224
3225					$$ = n;
3226				}
3227
3228			/* a DEFAULT partition */
3229			| DEFAULT
3230				{
3231					PartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);
3232
3233					n->is_default = true;
3234					n->location = @1;
3235
3236					$$ = n;
3237				}
3238		;
3239
3240hash_partbound_elem:
3241		NonReservedWord Iconst
3242			{
3243				$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) makeInteger($2), @1);
3244			}
3245		;
3246
3247hash_partbound:
3248		hash_partbound_elem
3249			{
3250				$$ = list_make1($1);
3251			}
3252		| hash_partbound ',' hash_partbound_elem
3253			{
3254				$$ = lappend($1, $3);
3255			}
3256		;
3257
3258/*****************************************************************************
3259 *
3260 *	ALTER TYPE
3261 *
3262 * really variants of the ALTER TABLE subcommands with different spellings
3263 *****************************************************************************/
3264
3265AlterCompositeTypeStmt:
3266			ALTER TYPE_P any_name alter_type_cmds
3267				{
3268					AlterTableStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTableStmt);
3269
3270					/* can't use qualified_name, sigh */
3271					n->relation = makeRangeVarFromAnyName($3, @3, yyscanner);
3272					n->cmds = $4;
3273					n->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;
3274					$$ = (Node *) n;
3275				}
3276			;
3277
3278alter_type_cmds:
3279			alter_type_cmd							{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
3280			| alter_type_cmds ',' alter_type_cmd	{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
3281		;
3282
3283alter_type_cmd:
3284			/* ALTER TYPE <name> ADD ATTRIBUTE <coldef> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */
3285			ADD_P ATTRIBUTE TableFuncElement opt_drop_behavior
3286				{
3287					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
3288
3289					n->subtype = AT_AddColumn;
3290					n->def = $3;
3291					n->behavior = $4;
3292					$$ = (Node *) n;
3293				}
3294			/* ALTER TYPE <name> DROP ATTRIBUTE IF EXISTS <attname> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */
3295			| DROP ATTRIBUTE IF_P EXISTS ColId opt_drop_behavior
3296				{
3297					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
3298
3299					n->subtype = AT_DropColumn;
3300					n->name = $5;
3301					n->behavior = $6;
3302					n->missing_ok = true;
3303					$$ = (Node *) n;
3304				}
3305			/* ALTER TYPE <name> DROP ATTRIBUTE <attname> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */
3306			| DROP ATTRIBUTE ColId opt_drop_behavior
3307				{
3308					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
3309
3310					n->subtype = AT_DropColumn;
3311					n->name = $3;
3312					n->behavior = $4;
3313					n->missing_ok = false;
3314					$$ = (Node *) n;
3315				}
3316			/* ALTER TYPE <name> ALTER ATTRIBUTE <attname> [SET DATA] TYPE <typename> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */
3317			| ALTER ATTRIBUTE ColId opt_set_data TYPE_P Typename opt_collate_clause opt_drop_behavior
3318				{
3319					AlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);
3320					ColumnDef *def = makeNode(ColumnDef);
3321
3322					n->subtype = AT_AlterColumnType;
3323					n->name = $3;
3324					n->def = (Node *) def;
3325					n->behavior = $8;
3326					/* We only use these fields of the ColumnDef node */
3327					def->typeName = $6;
3328					def->collClause = (CollateClause *) $7;
3329					def->raw_default = NULL;
3330					def->location = @3;
3331					$$ = (Node *) n;
3332				}
3333		;
3334
3335
3336/*****************************************************************************
3337 *
3338 *		QUERY :
3339 *				close <portalname>
3340 *
3341 *****************************************************************************/
3342
3343ClosePortalStmt:
3344			CLOSE cursor_name
3345				{
3346					ClosePortalStmt *n = makeNode(ClosePortalStmt);
3347
3348					n->portalname = $2;
3349					$$ = (Node *) n;
3350				}
3351			| CLOSE ALL
3352				{
3353					ClosePortalStmt *n = makeNode(ClosePortalStmt);
3354
3355					n->portalname = NULL;
3356					$$ = (Node *) n;
3357				}
3358		;
3359
3360
3361/*****************************************************************************
3362 *
3363 *		QUERY :
3364 *				COPY relname [(columnList)] FROM/TO file [WITH] [(options)]
3365 *				COPY ( query ) TO file	[WITH] [(options)]
3366 *
3367 *				where 'query' can be one of:
3368 *				{ SELECT | UPDATE | INSERT | DELETE }
3369 *
3370 *				and 'file' can be one of:
3371 *				{ PROGRAM 'command' | STDIN | STDOUT | 'filename' }
3372 *
3373 *				In the preferred syntax the options are comma-separated
3374 *				and use generic identifiers instead of keywords.  The pre-9.0
3375 *				syntax had a hard-wired, space-separated set of options.
3376 *
3377 *				Really old syntax, from versions 7.2 and prior:
3378 *				COPY [ BINARY ] table FROM/TO file
3379 *					[ [ USING ] DELIMITERS 'delimiter' ] ]
3380 *					[ WITH NULL AS 'null string' ]
3381 *				This option placement is not supported with COPY (query...).
3382 *
3383 *****************************************************************************/
3384
3385CopyStmt:	COPY opt_binary qualified_name opt_column_list
3386			copy_from opt_program copy_file_name copy_delimiter opt_with
3387			copy_options where_clause
3388				{
3389					CopyStmt *n = makeNode(CopyStmt);
3390
3391					n->relation = $3;
3392					n->query = NULL;
3393					n->attlist = $4;
3394					n->is_from = $5;
3395					n->is_program = $6;
3396					n->filename = $7;
3397					n->whereClause = $11;
3398
3399					if (n->is_program && n->filename == NULL)
3400						ereport(ERROR,
3401								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
3402								 errmsg("STDIN/STDOUT not allowed with PROGRAM"),
3403								 parser_errposition(@8)));
3404
3405					if (!n->is_from && n->whereClause != NULL)
3406						ereport(ERROR,
3407								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
3408								 errmsg("WHERE clause not allowed with COPY TO"),
3409								 parser_errposition(@11)));
3410
3411					n->options = NIL;
3412					/* Concatenate user-supplied flags */
3413					if ($2)
3414						n->options = lappend(n->options, $2);
3415					if ($8)
3416						n->options = lappend(n->options, $8);
3417					if ($10)
3418						n->options = list_concat(n->options, $10);
3419					$$ = (Node *) n;
3420				}
3421			| COPY '(' PreparableStmt ')' TO opt_program copy_file_name opt_with copy_options
3422				{
3423					CopyStmt *n = makeNode(CopyStmt);
3424
3425					n->relation = NULL;
3426					n->query = $3;
3427					n->attlist = NIL;
3428					n->is_from = false;
3429					n->is_program = $6;
3430					n->filename = $7;
3431					n->options = $9;
3432
3433					if (n->is_program && n->filename == NULL)
3434						ereport(ERROR,
3435								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
3436								 errmsg("STDIN/STDOUT not allowed with PROGRAM"),
3437								 parser_errposition(@5)));
3438
3439					$$ = (Node *) n;
3440				}
3441		;
3442
3443copy_from:
3444			FROM									{ $$ = true; }
3445			| TO									{ $$ = false; }
3446		;
3447
3448opt_program:
3449			PROGRAM									{ $$ = true; }
3450			| /* EMPTY */							{ $$ = false; }
3451		;
3452
3453/*
3454 * copy_file_name NULL indicates stdio is used. Whether stdin or stdout is
3455 * used depends on the direction. (It really doesn't make sense to copy from
3456 * stdout. We silently correct the "typo".)		 - AY 9/94
3457 */
3458copy_file_name:
3459			Sconst									{ $$ = $1; }
3460			| STDIN									{ $$ = NULL; }
3461			| STDOUT								{ $$ = NULL; }
3462		;
3463
3464copy_options: copy_opt_list							{ $$ = $1; }
3465			| '(' copy_generic_opt_list ')'			{ $$ = $2; }
3466		;
3467
3468/* old COPY option syntax */
3469copy_opt_list:
3470			copy_opt_list copy_opt_item				{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
3471			| /* EMPTY */							{ $$ = NIL; }
3472		;
3473
3474copy_opt_item:
3475			BINARY
3476				{
3477					$$ = makeDefElem("format", (Node *) makeString("binary"), @1);
3478				}
3479			| FREEZE
3480				{
3481					$$ = makeDefElem("freeze", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);
3482				}
3483			| DELIMITER opt_as Sconst
3484				{
3485					$$ = makeDefElem("delimiter", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);
3486				}
3487			| NULL_P opt_as Sconst
3488				{
3489					$$ = makeDefElem("null", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);
3490				}
3491			| CSV
3492				{
3493					$$ = makeDefElem("format", (Node *) makeString("csv"), @1);
3494				}
3495			| HEADER_P
3496				{
3497					$$ = makeDefElem("header", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);
3498				}
3499			| QUOTE opt_as Sconst
3500				{
3501					$$ = makeDefElem("quote", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);
3502				}
3503			| ESCAPE opt_as Sconst
3504				{
3505					$$ = makeDefElem("escape", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);
3506				}
3507			| FORCE QUOTE columnList
3508				{
3509					$$ = makeDefElem("force_quote", (Node *) $3, @1);
3510				}
3511			| FORCE QUOTE '*'
3512				{
3513					$$ = makeDefElem("force_quote", (Node *) makeNode(A_Star), @1);
3514				}
3515			| FORCE NOT NULL_P columnList
3516				{
3517					$$ = makeDefElem("force_not_null", (Node *) $4, @1);
3518				}
3519			| FORCE NOT NULL_P '*'
3520				{
3521					$$ = makeDefElem("force_not_null", (Node *) makeNode(A_Star), @1);
3522				}
3523			| FORCE NULL_P columnList
3524				{
3525					$$ = makeDefElem("force_null", (Node *) $3, @1);
3526				}
3527			| FORCE NULL_P '*'
3528				{
3529					$$ = makeDefElem("force_null", (Node *) makeNode(A_Star), @1);
3530				}
3531			| ENCODING Sconst
3532				{
3533					$$ = makeDefElem("encoding", (Node *) makeString($2), @1);
3534				}
3535		;
3536
3537/* The following exist for backward compatibility with very old versions */
3538
3539opt_binary:
3540			BINARY
3541				{
3542					$$ = makeDefElem("format", (Node *) makeString("binary"), @1);
3543				}
3544			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
3545		;
3546
3547copy_delimiter:
3548			opt_using DELIMITERS Sconst
3549				{
3550					$$ = makeDefElem("delimiter", (Node *) makeString($3), @2);
3551				}
3552			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
3553		;
3554
3555opt_using:
3556			USING
3557			| /*EMPTY*/
3558		;
3559
3560/* new COPY option syntax */
3561copy_generic_opt_list:
3562			copy_generic_opt_elem
3563				{
3564					$$ = list_make1($1);
3565				}
3566			| copy_generic_opt_list ',' copy_generic_opt_elem
3567				{
3568					$$ = lappend($1, $3);
3569				}
3570		;
3571
3572copy_generic_opt_elem:
3573			ColLabel copy_generic_opt_arg
3574				{
3575					$$ = makeDefElem($1, $2, @1);
3576				}
3577		;
3578
3579copy_generic_opt_arg:
3580			opt_boolean_or_string			{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }
3581			| NumericOnly					{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }
3582			| '*'							{ $$ = (Node *) makeNode(A_Star); }
3583			| DEFAULT                       { $$ = (Node *) makeString("default"); }
3584			| '(' copy_generic_opt_arg_list ')'		{ $$ = (Node *) $2; }
3585			| /* EMPTY */					{ $$ = NULL; }
3586		;
3587
3588copy_generic_opt_arg_list:
3589			  copy_generic_opt_arg_list_item
3590				{
3591					$$ = list_make1($1);
3592				}
3593			| copy_generic_opt_arg_list ',' copy_generic_opt_arg_list_item
3594				{
3595					$$ = lappend($1, $3);
3596				}
3597		;
3598
3599/* beware of emitting non-string list elements here; see commands/define.c */
3600copy_generic_opt_arg_list_item:
3601			opt_boolean_or_string	{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }
3602		;
3603
3604
3605/*****************************************************************************
3606 *
3607 *		QUERY :
3608 *				CREATE TABLE relname
3609 *
3610 *****************************************************************************/
3611
3612CreateStmt:	CREATE OptTemp TABLE qualified_name '(' OptTableElementList ')'
3613			OptInherit OptPartitionSpec table_access_method_clause OptWith
3614			OnCommitOption OptTableSpace
3615				{
3616					CreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);
3617
3618					$4->relpersistence = $2;
3619					n->relation = $4;
3620					n->tableElts = $6;
3621					n->inhRelations = $8;
3622					n->partspec = $9;
3623					n->ofTypename = NULL;
3624					n->constraints = NIL;
3625					n->accessMethod = $10;
3626					n->options = $11;
3627					n->oncommit = $12;
3628					n->tablespacename = $13;
3629					n->if_not_exists = false;
3630					$$ = (Node *) n;
3631				}
3632		| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name '('
3633			OptTableElementList ')' OptInherit OptPartitionSpec table_access_method_clause
3634			OptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace
3635				{
3636					CreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);
3637
3638					$7->relpersistence = $2;
3639					n->relation = $7;
3640					n->tableElts = $9;
3641					n->inhRelations = $11;
3642					n->partspec = $12;
3643					n->ofTypename = NULL;
3644					n->constraints = NIL;
3645					n->accessMethod = $13;
3646					n->options = $14;
3647					n->oncommit = $15;
3648					n->tablespacename = $16;
3649					n->if_not_exists = true;
3650					$$ = (Node *) n;
3651				}
3652		| CREATE OptTemp TABLE qualified_name OF any_name
3653			OptTypedTableElementList OptPartitionSpec table_access_method_clause
3654			OptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace
3655				{
3656					CreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);
3657
3658					$4->relpersistence = $2;
3659					n->relation = $4;
3660					n->tableElts = $7;
3661					n->inhRelations = NIL;
3662					n->partspec = $8;
3663					n->ofTypename = makeTypeNameFromNameList($6);
3664					n->ofTypename->location = @6;
3665					n->constraints = NIL;
3666					n->accessMethod = $9;
3667					n->options = $10;
3668					n->oncommit = $11;
3669					n->tablespacename = $12;
3670					n->if_not_exists = false;
3671					$$ = (Node *) n;
3672				}
3673		| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name OF any_name
3674			OptTypedTableElementList OptPartitionSpec table_access_method_clause
3675			OptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace
3676				{
3677					CreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);
3678
3679					$7->relpersistence = $2;
3680					n->relation = $7;
3681					n->tableElts = $10;
3682					n->inhRelations = NIL;
3683					n->partspec = $11;
3684					n->ofTypename = makeTypeNameFromNameList($9);
3685					n->ofTypename->location = @9;
3686					n->constraints = NIL;
3687					n->accessMethod = $12;
3688					n->options = $13;
3689					n->oncommit = $14;
3690					n->tablespacename = $15;
3691					n->if_not_exists = true;
3692					$$ = (Node *) n;
3693				}
3694		| CREATE OptTemp TABLE qualified_name PARTITION OF qualified_name
3695			OptTypedTableElementList PartitionBoundSpec OptPartitionSpec
3696			table_access_method_clause OptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace
3697				{
3698					CreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);
3699
3700					$4->relpersistence = $2;
3701					n->relation = $4;
3702					n->tableElts = $8;
3703					n->inhRelations = list_make1($7);
3704					n->partbound = $9;
3705					n->partspec = $10;
3706					n->ofTypename = NULL;
3707					n->constraints = NIL;
3708					n->accessMethod = $11;
3709					n->options = $12;
3710					n->oncommit = $13;
3711					n->tablespacename = $14;
3712					n->if_not_exists = false;
3713					$$ = (Node *) n;
3714				}
3715		| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name PARTITION OF
3716			qualified_name OptTypedTableElementList PartitionBoundSpec OptPartitionSpec
3717			table_access_method_clause OptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace
3718				{
3719					CreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);
3720
3721					$7->relpersistence = $2;
3722					n->relation = $7;
3723					n->tableElts = $11;
3724					n->inhRelations = list_make1($10);
3725					n->partbound = $12;
3726					n->partspec = $13;
3727					n->ofTypename = NULL;
3728					n->constraints = NIL;
3729					n->accessMethod = $14;
3730					n->options = $15;
3731					n->oncommit = $16;
3732					n->tablespacename = $17;
3733					n->if_not_exists = true;
3734					$$ = (Node *) n;
3735				}
3736		;
3737
3738/*
3739 * Redundancy here is needed to avoid shift/reduce conflicts,
3740 * since TEMP is not a reserved word.  See also OptTempTableName.
3741 *
3742 * NOTE: we accept both GLOBAL and LOCAL options.  They currently do nothing,
3743 * but future versions might consider GLOBAL to request SQL-spec-compliant
3744 * temp table behavior, so warn about that.  Since we have no modules the
3745 * LOCAL keyword is really meaningless; furthermore, some other products
3746 * implement LOCAL as meaning the same as our default temp table behavior,
3747 * so we'll probably continue to treat LOCAL as a noise word.
3748 */
3749OptTemp:	TEMPORARY					{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }
3750			| TEMP						{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }
3751			| LOCAL TEMPORARY			{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }
3752			| LOCAL TEMP				{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }
3753			| GLOBAL TEMPORARY
3754				{
3755					ereport(WARNING,
3756							(errmsg("GLOBAL is deprecated in temporary table creation"),
3757							 parser_errposition(@1)));
3758					$$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP;
3759				}
3760			| GLOBAL TEMP
3761				{
3762					ereport(WARNING,
3763							(errmsg("GLOBAL is deprecated in temporary table creation"),
3764							 parser_errposition(@1)));
3765					$$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP;
3766				}
3767			| UNLOGGED					{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_UNLOGGED; }
3768			| /*EMPTY*/					{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT; }
3769		;
3770
3771OptTableElementList:
3772			TableElementList					{ $$ = $1; }
3773			| /*EMPTY*/							{ $$ = NIL; }
3774		;
3775
3776OptTypedTableElementList:
3777			'(' TypedTableElementList ')'		{ $$ = $2; }
3778			| /*EMPTY*/							{ $$ = NIL; }
3779		;
3780
3781TableElementList:
3782			TableElement
3783				{
3784					$$ = list_make1($1);
3785				}
3786			| TableElementList ',' TableElement
3787				{
3788					$$ = lappend($1, $3);
3789				}
3790		;
3791
3792TypedTableElementList:
3793			TypedTableElement
3794				{
3795					$$ = list_make1($1);
3796				}
3797			| TypedTableElementList ',' TypedTableElement
3798				{
3799					$$ = lappend($1, $3);
3800				}
3801		;
3802
3803TableElement:
3804			columnDef							{ $$ = $1; }
3805			| TableLikeClause					{ $$ = $1; }
3806			| TableConstraint					{ $$ = $1; }
3807		;
3808
3809TypedTableElement:
3810			columnOptions						{ $$ = $1; }
3811			| TableConstraint					{ $$ = $1; }
3812		;
3813
3814columnDef:	ColId Typename opt_column_storage opt_column_compression create_generic_options ColQualList
3815				{
3816					ColumnDef *n = makeNode(ColumnDef);
3817
3818					n->colname = $1;
3819					n->typeName = $2;
3820					n->storage_name = $3;
3821					n->compression = $4;
3822					n->inhcount = 0;
3823					n->is_local = true;
3824					n->is_not_null = false;
3825					n->is_from_type = false;
3826					n->storage = 0;
3827					n->raw_default = NULL;
3828					n->cooked_default = NULL;
3829					n->collOid = InvalidOid;
3830					n->fdwoptions = $5;
3831					SplitColQualList($6, &n->constraints, &n->collClause,
3832									 yyscanner);
3833					n->location = @1;
3834					$$ = (Node *) n;
3835				}
3836		;
3837
3838columnOptions:	ColId ColQualList
3839				{
3840					ColumnDef *n = makeNode(ColumnDef);
3841
3842					n->colname = $1;
3843					n->typeName = NULL;
3844					n->inhcount = 0;
3845					n->is_local = true;
3846					n->is_not_null = false;
3847					n->is_from_type = false;
3848					n->storage = 0;
3849					n->raw_default = NULL;
3850					n->cooked_default = NULL;
3851					n->collOid = InvalidOid;
3852					SplitColQualList($2, &n->constraints, &n->collClause,
3853									 yyscanner);
3854					n->location = @1;
3855					$$ = (Node *) n;
3856				}
3857				| ColId WITH OPTIONS ColQualList
3858				{
3859					ColumnDef *n = makeNode(ColumnDef);
3860
3861					n->colname = $1;
3862					n->typeName = NULL;
3863					n->inhcount = 0;
3864					n->is_local = true;
3865					n->is_not_null = false;
3866					n->is_from_type = false;
3867					n->storage = 0;
3868					n->raw_default = NULL;
3869					n->cooked_default = NULL;
3870					n->collOid = InvalidOid;
3871					SplitColQualList($4, &n->constraints, &n->collClause,
3872									 yyscanner);
3873					n->location = @1;
3874					$$ = (Node *) n;
3875				}
3876		;
3877
3878column_compression:
3879			COMPRESSION ColId						{ $$ = $2; }
3880			| COMPRESSION DEFAULT					{ $$ = pstrdup("default"); }
3881		;
3882
3883opt_column_compression:
3884			column_compression						{ $$ = $1; }
3885			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
3886		;
3887
3888column_storage:
3889			STORAGE ColId							{ $$ = $2; }
3890			| STORAGE DEFAULT						{ $$ = pstrdup("default"); }
3891		;
3892
3893opt_column_storage:
3894			column_storage							{ $$ = $1; }
3895			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
3896		;
3897
3898ColQualList:
3899			ColQualList ColConstraint				{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
3900			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
3901		;
3902
3903ColConstraint:
3904			CONSTRAINT name ColConstraintElem
3905				{
3906					Constraint *n = castNode(Constraint, $3);
3907
3908					n->conname = $2;
3909					n->location = @1;
3910					$$ = (Node *) n;
3911				}
3912			| ColConstraintElem						{ $$ = $1; }
3913			| ConstraintAttr						{ $$ = $1; }
3914			| COLLATE any_name
3915				{
3916					/*
3917					 * Note: the CollateClause is momentarily included in
3918					 * the list built by ColQualList, but we split it out
3919					 * again in SplitColQualList.
3920					 */
3921					CollateClause *n = makeNode(CollateClause);
3922
3923					n->arg = NULL;
3924					n->collname = $2;
3925					n->location = @1;
3926					$$ = (Node *) n;
3927				}
3928		;
3929
3930/* DEFAULT NULL is already the default for Postgres.
3931 * But define it here and carry it forward into the system
3932 * to make it explicit.
3933 * - thomas 1998-09-13
3934 *
3935 * WITH NULL and NULL are not SQL-standard syntax elements,
3936 * so leave them out. Use DEFAULT NULL to explicitly indicate
3937 * that a column may have that value. WITH NULL leads to
3938 * shift/reduce conflicts with WITH TIME ZONE anyway.
3939 * - thomas 1999-01-08
3940 *
3941 * DEFAULT expression must be b_expr not a_expr to prevent shift/reduce
3942 * conflict on NOT (since NOT might start a subsequent NOT NULL constraint,
3943 * or be part of a_expr NOT LIKE or similar constructs).
3944 */
3945ColConstraintElem:
3946			NOT NULL_P opt_no_inherit
3947				{
3948					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
3949
3950					n->contype = CONSTR_NOTNULL;
3951					n->location = @1;
3952					n->is_no_inherit = $3;
3953					n->is_enforced = true;
3954					n->skip_validation = false;
3955					n->initially_valid = true;
3956					$$ = (Node *) n;
3957				}
3958			| NULL_P
3959				{
3960					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
3961
3962					n->contype = CONSTR_NULL;
3963					n->location = @1;
3964					$$ = (Node *) n;
3965				}
3966			| UNIQUE opt_unique_null_treatment opt_definition OptConsTableSpace
3967				{
3968					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
3969
3970					n->contype = CONSTR_UNIQUE;
3971					n->location = @1;
3972					n->nulls_not_distinct = !$2;
3973					n->keys = NULL;
3974					n->options = $3;
3975					n->indexname = NULL;
3976					n->indexspace = $4;
3977					$$ = (Node *) n;
3978				}
3979			| PRIMARY KEY opt_definition OptConsTableSpace
3980				{
3981					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
3982
3983					n->contype = CONSTR_PRIMARY;
3984					n->location = @1;
3985					n->keys = NULL;
3986					n->options = $3;
3987					n->indexname = NULL;
3988					n->indexspace = $4;
3989					$$ = (Node *) n;
3990				}
3991			| CHECK '(' a_expr ')' opt_no_inherit
3992				{
3993					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
3994
3995					n->contype = CONSTR_CHECK;
3996					n->location = @1;
3997					n->is_no_inherit = $5;
3998					n->raw_expr = $3;
3999					n->cooked_expr = NULL;
4000					n->is_enforced = true;
4001					n->skip_validation = false;
4002					n->initially_valid = true;
4003					$$ = (Node *) n;
4004				}
4005			| DEFAULT b_expr
4006				{
4007					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4008
4009					n->contype = CONSTR_DEFAULT;
4010					n->location = @1;
4011					n->raw_expr = $2;
4012					n->cooked_expr = NULL;
4013					$$ = (Node *) n;
4014				}
4015			| GENERATED generated_when AS IDENTITY_P OptParenthesizedSeqOptList
4016				{
4017					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4018
4019					n->contype = CONSTR_IDENTITY;
4020					n->generated_when = $2;
4021					n->options = $5;
4022					n->location = @1;
4023					$$ = (Node *) n;
4024				}
4025			| GENERATED generated_when AS '(' a_expr ')' opt_virtual_or_stored
4026				{
4027					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4028
4029					n->contype = CONSTR_GENERATED;
4030					n->generated_when = $2;
4031					n->raw_expr = $5;
4032					n->cooked_expr = NULL;
4033					n->generated_kind = $7;
4034					n->location = @1;
4035
4036					/*
4037					 * Can't do this in the grammar because of shift/reduce
4038					 * conflicts.  (IDENTITY allows both ALWAYS and BY
4039					 * DEFAULT, but generated columns only allow ALWAYS.)  We
4040					 * can also give a more useful error message and location.
4041					 */
4042					if ($2 != ATTRIBUTE_IDENTITY_ALWAYS)
4043						ereport(ERROR,
4044								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
4045								 errmsg("for a generated column, GENERATED ALWAYS must be specified"),
4046								 parser_errposition(@2)));
4047
4048					$$ = (Node *) n;
4049				}
4050			| REFERENCES qualified_name opt_column_list key_match key_actions
4051				{
4052					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4053
4054					n->contype = CONSTR_FOREIGN;
4055					n->location = @1;
4056					n->pktable = $2;
4057					n->fk_attrs = NIL;
4058					n->pk_attrs = $3;
4059					n->fk_matchtype = $4;
4060					n->fk_upd_action = ($5)->updateAction->action;
4061					n->fk_del_action = ($5)->deleteAction->action;
4062					n->fk_del_set_cols = ($5)->deleteAction->cols;
4063					n->is_enforced = true;
4064					n->skip_validation = false;
4065					n->initially_valid = true;
4066					$$ = (Node *) n;
4067				}
4068		;
4069
4070opt_unique_null_treatment:
4071			NULLS_P DISTINCT		{ $$ = true; }
4072			| NULLS_P NOT DISTINCT	{ $$ = false; }
4073			| /*EMPTY*/				{ $$ = true; }
4074		;
4075
4076generated_when:
4077			ALWAYS			{ $$ = ATTRIBUTE_IDENTITY_ALWAYS; }
4078			| BY DEFAULT	{ $$ = ATTRIBUTE_IDENTITY_BY_DEFAULT; }
4079		;
4080
4081opt_virtual_or_stored:
4082			STORED			{ $$ = ATTRIBUTE_GENERATED_STORED; }
4083			| VIRTUAL		{ $$ = ATTRIBUTE_GENERATED_VIRTUAL; }
4084			| /*EMPTY*/		{ $$ = ATTRIBUTE_GENERATED_VIRTUAL; }
4085		;
4086
4087/*
4088 * ConstraintAttr represents constraint attributes, which we parse as if
4089 * they were independent constraint clauses, in order to avoid shift/reduce
4090 * conflicts (since NOT might start either an independent NOT NULL clause
4091 * or an attribute).  parse_utilcmd.c is responsible for attaching the
4092 * attribute information to the preceding "real" constraint node, and for
4093 * complaining if attribute clauses appear in the wrong place or wrong
4094 * combinations.
4095 *
4096 * See also ConstraintAttributeSpec, which can be used in places where
4097 * there is no parsing conflict.  (Note: currently, NOT VALID and NO INHERIT
4098 * are allowed clauses in ConstraintAttributeSpec, but not here.  Someday we
4099 * might need to allow them here too, but for the moment it doesn't seem
4100 * useful in the statements that use ConstraintAttr.)
4101 */
4102ConstraintAttr:
4103			DEFERRABLE
4104				{
4105					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4106
4107					n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_DEFERRABLE;
4108					n->location = @1;
4109					$$ = (Node *) n;
4110				}
4111			| NOT DEFERRABLE
4112				{
4113					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4114
4115					n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_NOT_DEFERRABLE;
4116					n->location = @1;
4117					$$ = (Node *) n;
4118				}
4119			| INITIALLY DEFERRED
4120				{
4121					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4122
4123					n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_DEFERRED;
4124					n->location = @1;
4125					$$ = (Node *) n;
4126				}
4127			| INITIALLY IMMEDIATE
4128				{
4129					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4130
4131					n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_IMMEDIATE;
4132					n->location = @1;
4133					$$ = (Node *) n;
4134				}
4135			| ENFORCED
4136				{
4137					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4138
4139					n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_ENFORCED;
4140					n->location = @1;
4141					$$ = (Node *) n;
4142				}
4143			| NOT ENFORCED
4144				{
4145					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4146
4147					n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_NOT_ENFORCED;
4148					n->location = @1;
4149					$$ = (Node *) n;
4150				}
4151		;
4152
4153
4154TableLikeClause:
4155			LIKE qualified_name TableLikeOptionList
4156				{
4157					TableLikeClause *n = makeNode(TableLikeClause);
4158
4159					n->relation = $2;
4160					n->options = $3;
4161					n->relationOid = InvalidOid;
4162					$$ = (Node *) n;
4163				}
4164		;
4165
4166TableLikeOptionList:
4167				TableLikeOptionList INCLUDING TableLikeOption	{ $$ = $1 | $3; }
4168				| TableLikeOptionList EXCLUDING TableLikeOption	{ $$ = $1 & ~$3; }
4169				| /* EMPTY */						{ $$ = 0; }
4170		;
4171
4172TableLikeOption:
4173				COMMENTS			{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_COMMENTS; }
4174				| COMPRESSION		{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_COMPRESSION; }
4175				| CONSTRAINTS		{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_CONSTRAINTS; }
4176				| DEFAULTS			{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_DEFAULTS; }
4177				| IDENTITY_P		{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_IDENTITY; }
4178				| GENERATED			{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_GENERATED; }
4179				| INDEXES			{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_INDEXES; }
4180				| STATISTICS		{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_STATISTICS; }
4181				| STORAGE			{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_STORAGE; }
4182				| ALL				{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_ALL; }
4183		;
4184
4185
4186/* ConstraintElem specifies constraint syntax which is not embedded into
4187 *	a column definition. ColConstraintElem specifies the embedded form.
4188 * - thomas 1997-12-03
4189 */
4190TableConstraint:
4191			CONSTRAINT name ConstraintElem
4192				{
4193					Constraint *n = castNode(Constraint, $3);
4194
4195					n->conname = $2;
4196					n->location = @1;
4197					$$ = (Node *) n;
4198				}
4199			| ConstraintElem						{ $$ = $1; }
4200		;
4201
4202ConstraintElem:
4203			CHECK '(' a_expr ')' ConstraintAttributeSpec
4204				{
4205					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4206
4207					n->contype = CONSTR_CHECK;
4208					n->location = @1;
4209					n->raw_expr = $3;
4210					n->cooked_expr = NULL;
4211					processCASbits($5, @5, "CHECK",
4212								   NULL, NULL, &n->is_enforced, &n->skip_validation,
4213								   &n->is_no_inherit, yyscanner);
4214					n->initially_valid = !n->skip_validation;
4215					$$ = (Node *) n;
4216				}
4217			| NOT NULL_P ColId ConstraintAttributeSpec
4218				{
4219					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4220
4221					n->contype = CONSTR_NOTNULL;
4222					n->location = @1;
4223					n->keys = list_make1(makeString($3));
4224					processCASbits($4, @4, "NOT NULL",
4225								   NULL, NULL, NULL, &n->skip_validation,
4226								   &n->is_no_inherit, yyscanner);
4227					n->initially_valid = !n->skip_validation;
4228					$$ = (Node *) n;
4229				}
4230			| UNIQUE opt_unique_null_treatment '(' columnList opt_without_overlaps ')' opt_c_include opt_definition OptConsTableSpace
4231				ConstraintAttributeSpec
4232				{
4233					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4234
4235					n->contype = CONSTR_UNIQUE;
4236					n->location = @1;
4237					n->nulls_not_distinct = !$2;
4238					n->keys = $4;
4239					n->without_overlaps = $5;
4240					n->including = $7;
4241					n->options = $8;
4242					n->indexname = NULL;
4243					n->indexspace = $9;
4244					processCASbits($10, @10, "UNIQUE",
4245								   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,
4246								   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);
4247					$$ = (Node *) n;
4248				}
4249			| UNIQUE ExistingIndex ConstraintAttributeSpec
4250				{
4251					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4252
4253					n->contype = CONSTR_UNIQUE;
4254					n->location = @1;
4255					n->keys = NIL;
4256					n->including = NIL;
4257					n->options = NIL;
4258					n->indexname = $2;
4259					n->indexspace = NULL;
4260					processCASbits($3, @3, "UNIQUE",
4261								   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,
4262								   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);
4263					$$ = (Node *) n;
4264				}
4265			| PRIMARY KEY '(' columnList opt_without_overlaps ')' opt_c_include opt_definition OptConsTableSpace
4266				ConstraintAttributeSpec
4267				{
4268					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4269
4270					n->contype = CONSTR_PRIMARY;
4271					n->location = @1;
4272					n->keys = $4;
4273					n->without_overlaps = $5;
4274					n->including = $7;
4275					n->options = $8;
4276					n->indexname = NULL;
4277					n->indexspace = $9;
4278					processCASbits($10, @10, "PRIMARY KEY",
4279								   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,
4280								   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);
4281					$$ = (Node *) n;
4282				}
4283			| PRIMARY KEY ExistingIndex ConstraintAttributeSpec
4284				{
4285					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4286
4287					n->contype = CONSTR_PRIMARY;
4288					n->location = @1;
4289					n->keys = NIL;
4290					n->including = NIL;
4291					n->options = NIL;
4292					n->indexname = $3;
4293					n->indexspace = NULL;
4294					processCASbits($4, @4, "PRIMARY KEY",
4295								   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,
4296								   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);
4297					$$ = (Node *) n;
4298				}
4299			| EXCLUDE access_method_clause '(' ExclusionConstraintList ')'
4300				opt_c_include opt_definition OptConsTableSpace OptWhereClause
4301				ConstraintAttributeSpec
4302				{
4303					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4304
4305					n->contype = CONSTR_EXCLUSION;
4306					n->location = @1;
4307					n->access_method = $2;
4308					n->exclusions = $4;
4309					n->including = $6;
4310					n->options = $7;
4311					n->indexname = NULL;
4312					n->indexspace = $8;
4313					n->where_clause = $9;
4314					processCASbits($10, @10, "EXCLUDE",
4315								   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,
4316								   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);
4317					$$ = (Node *) n;
4318				}
4319			| FOREIGN KEY '(' columnList optionalPeriodName ')' REFERENCES qualified_name
4320				opt_column_and_period_list key_match key_actions ConstraintAttributeSpec
4321				{
4322					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4323
4324					n->contype = CONSTR_FOREIGN;
4325					n->location = @1;
4326					n->pktable = $8;
4327					n->fk_attrs = $4;
4328					if ($5)
4329					{
4330						n->fk_attrs = lappend(n->fk_attrs, $5);
4331						n->fk_with_period = true;
4332					}
4333					n->pk_attrs = linitial($9);
4334					if (lsecond($9))
4335					{
4336						n->pk_attrs = lappend(n->pk_attrs, lsecond($9));
4337						n->pk_with_period = true;
4338					}
4339					n->fk_matchtype = $10;
4340					n->fk_upd_action = ($11)->updateAction->action;
4341					n->fk_del_action = ($11)->deleteAction->action;
4342					n->fk_del_set_cols = ($11)->deleteAction->cols;
4343					processCASbits($12, @12, "FOREIGN KEY",
4344								   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred,
4345								   &n->is_enforced, &n->skip_validation, NULL,
4346								   yyscanner);
4347					n->initially_valid = !n->skip_validation;
4348					$$ = (Node *) n;
4349				}
4350		;
4351
4352/*
4353 * DomainConstraint is separate from TableConstraint because the syntax for
4354 * NOT NULL constraints is different.  For table constraints, we need to
4355 * accept a column name, but for domain constraints, we don't.  (We could
4356 * accept something like NOT NULL VALUE, but that seems weird.)  CREATE DOMAIN
4357 * (which uses ColQualList) has for a long time accepted NOT NULL without a
4358 * column name, so it makes sense that ALTER DOMAIN (which uses
4359 * DomainConstraint) does as well.  None of these syntaxes are per SQL
4360 * standard; we are just living with the bits of inconsistency that have built
4361 * up over time.
4362 */
4363DomainConstraint:
4364			CONSTRAINT name DomainConstraintElem
4365				{
4366					Constraint *n = castNode(Constraint, $3);
4367
4368					n->conname = $2;
4369					n->location = @1;
4370					$$ = (Node *) n;
4371				}
4372			| DomainConstraintElem					{ $$ = $1; }
4373		;
4374
4375DomainConstraintElem:
4376			CHECK '(' a_expr ')' ConstraintAttributeSpec
4377				{
4378					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4379
4380					n->contype = CONSTR_CHECK;
4381					n->location = @1;
4382					n->raw_expr = $3;
4383					n->cooked_expr = NULL;
4384					processCASbits($5, @5, "CHECK",
4385								   NULL, NULL, NULL, &n->skip_validation,
4386								   &n->is_no_inherit, yyscanner);
4387					n->is_enforced = true;
4388					n->initially_valid = !n->skip_validation;
4389					$$ = (Node *) n;
4390				}
4391			| NOT NULL_P ConstraintAttributeSpec
4392				{
4393					Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
4394
4395					n->contype = CONSTR_NOTNULL;
4396					n->location = @1;
4397					n->keys = list_make1(makeString("value"));
4398					/* no NOT VALID, NO INHERIT support */
4399					processCASbits($3, @3, "NOT NULL",
4400								   NULL, NULL, NULL,
4401								   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);
4402					n->initially_valid = true;
4403					$$ = (Node *) n;
4404				}
4405		;
4406
4407opt_no_inherit:	NO INHERIT							{  $$ = true; }
4408			| /* EMPTY */							{  $$ = false; }
4409		;
4410
4411opt_without_overlaps:
4412			WITHOUT OVERLAPS						{ $$ = true; }
4413			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = false; }
4414	;
4415
4416opt_column_list:
4417			'(' columnList ')'						{ $$ = $2; }
4418			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
4419		;
4420
4421columnList:
4422			columnElem								{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
4423			| columnList ',' columnElem				{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
4424		;
4425
4426optionalPeriodName:
4427			',' PERIOD columnElem { $$ = $3; }
4428			| /*EMPTY*/               { $$ = NULL; }
4429	;
4430
4431opt_column_and_period_list:
4432			'(' columnList optionalPeriodName ')'			{ $$ = list_make2($2, $3); }
4433			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = list_make2(NIL, NULL); }
4434		;
4435
4436columnElem: ColId
4437				{
4438					$$ = (Node *) makeString($1);
4439				}
4440		;
4441
4442opt_c_include:	INCLUDE '(' columnList ')'			{ $$ = $3; }
4443			 |		/* EMPTY */						{ $$ = NIL; }
4444		;
4445
4446key_match:  MATCH FULL
4447			{
4448				$$ = FKCONSTR_MATCH_FULL;
4449			}
4450		| MATCH PARTIAL
4451			{
4452				ereport(ERROR,
4453						(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
4454						 errmsg("MATCH PARTIAL not yet implemented"),
4455						 parser_errposition(@1)));
4456				$$ = FKCONSTR_MATCH_PARTIAL;
4457			}
4458		| MATCH SIMPLE
4459			{
4460				$$ = FKCONSTR_MATCH_SIMPLE;
4461			}
4462		| /*EMPTY*/
4463			{
4464				$$ = FKCONSTR_MATCH_SIMPLE;
4465			}
4466		;
4467
4468ExclusionConstraintList:
4469			ExclusionConstraintElem					{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
4470			| ExclusionConstraintList ',' ExclusionConstraintElem
4471													{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
4472		;
4473
4474ExclusionConstraintElem: index_elem WITH any_operator
4475			{
4476				$$ = list_make2($1, $3);
4477			}
4478			/* allow OPERATOR() decoration for the benefit of ruleutils.c */
4479			| index_elem WITH OPERATOR '(' any_operator ')'
4480			{
4481				$$ = list_make2($1, $5);
4482			}
4483		;
4484
4485OptWhereClause:
4486			WHERE '(' a_expr ')'					{ $$ = $3; }
4487			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
4488		;
4489
4490key_actions:
4491			key_update
4492				{
4493					KeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));
4494
4495					n->updateAction = $1;
4496					n->deleteAction = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4497					n->deleteAction->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;
4498					n->deleteAction->cols = NIL;
4499					$$ = n;
4500				}
4501			| key_delete
4502				{
4503					KeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));
4504
4505					n->updateAction = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4506					n->updateAction->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;
4507					n->updateAction->cols = NIL;
4508					n->deleteAction = $1;
4509					$$ = n;
4510				}
4511			| key_update key_delete
4512				{
4513					KeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));
4514
4515					n->updateAction = $1;
4516					n->deleteAction = $2;
4517					$$ = n;
4518				}
4519			| key_delete key_update
4520				{
4521					KeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));
4522
4523					n->updateAction = $2;
4524					n->deleteAction = $1;
4525					$$ = n;
4526				}
4527			| /*EMPTY*/
4528				{
4529					KeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));
4530
4531					n->updateAction = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4532					n->updateAction->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;
4533					n->updateAction->cols = NIL;
4534					n->deleteAction = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4535					n->deleteAction->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;
4536					n->deleteAction->cols = NIL;
4537					$$ = n;
4538				}
4539		;
4540
4541key_update: ON UPDATE key_action
4542				{
4543					if (($3)->cols)
4544						ereport(ERROR,
4545								(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
4546								 errmsg("a column list with %s is only supported for ON DELETE actions",
4547										($3)->action == FKCONSTR_ACTION_SETNULL ? "SET NULL" : "SET DEFAULT"),
4548								 parser_errposition(@1)));
4549					$$ = $3;
4550				}
4551		;
4552
4553key_delete: ON DELETE_P key_action
4554				{
4555					$$ = $3;
4556				}
4557		;
4558
4559key_action:
4560			NO ACTION
4561				{
4562					KeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4563
4564					n->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;
4565					n->cols = NIL;
4566					$$ = n;
4567				}
4568			| RESTRICT
4569				{
4570					KeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4571
4572					n->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_RESTRICT;
4573					n->cols = NIL;
4574					$$ = n;
4575				}
4576			| CASCADE
4577				{
4578					KeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4579
4580					n->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_CASCADE;
4581					n->cols = NIL;
4582					$$ = n;
4583				}
4584			| SET NULL_P opt_column_list
4585				{
4586					KeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4587
4588					n->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_SETNULL;
4589					n->cols = $3;
4590					$$ = n;
4591				}
4592			| SET DEFAULT opt_column_list
4593				{
4594					KeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));
4595
4596					n->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_SETDEFAULT;
4597					n->cols = $3;
4598					$$ = n;
4599				}
4600		;
4601
4602OptInherit: INHERITS '(' qualified_name_list ')'	{ $$ = $3; }
4603			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
4604		;
4605
4606/* Optional partition key specification */
4607OptPartitionSpec: PartitionSpec	{ $$ = $1; }
4608			| /*EMPTY*/			{ $$ = NULL; }
4609		;
4610
4611PartitionSpec: PARTITION BY ColId '(' part_params ')'
4612				{
4613					PartitionSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionSpec);
4614
4615					n->strategy = parsePartitionStrategy($3, @3, yyscanner);
4616					n->partParams = $5;
4617					n->location = @1;
4618
4619					$$ = n;
4620				}
4621		;
4622
4623part_params:	part_elem						{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
4624			| part_params ',' part_elem			{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
4625		;
4626
4627part_elem: ColId opt_collate opt_qualified_name
4628				{
4629					PartitionElem *n = makeNode(PartitionElem);
4630
4631					n->name = $1;
4632					n->expr = NULL;
4633					n->collation = $2;
4634					n->opclass = $3;
4635					n->location = @1;
4636					$$ = n;
4637				}
4638			| func_expr_windowless opt_collate opt_qualified_name
4639				{
4640					PartitionElem *n = makeNode(PartitionElem);
4641
4642					n->name = NULL;
4643					n->expr = $1;
4644					n->collation = $2;
4645					n->opclass = $3;
4646					n->location = @1;
4647					$$ = n;
4648				}
4649			| '(' a_expr ')' opt_collate opt_qualified_name
4650				{
4651					PartitionElem *n = makeNode(PartitionElem);
4652
4653					n->name = NULL;
4654					n->expr = $2;
4655					n->collation = $4;
4656					n->opclass = $5;
4657					n->location = @1;
4658					$$ = n;
4659				}
4660		;
4661
4662table_access_method_clause:
4663			USING name							{ $$ = $2; }
4664			| /*EMPTY*/							{ $$ = NULL; }
4665		;
4666
4667/* WITHOUT OIDS is legacy only */
4668OptWith:
4669			WITH reloptions				{ $$ = $2; }
4670			| WITHOUT OIDS				{ $$ = NIL; }
4671			| /*EMPTY*/					{ $$ = NIL; }
4672		;
4673
4674OnCommitOption:  ON COMMIT DROP				{ $$ = ONCOMMIT_DROP; }
4675			| ON COMMIT DELETE_P ROWS		{ $$ = ONCOMMIT_DELETE_ROWS; }
4676			| ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS		{ $$ = ONCOMMIT_PRESERVE_ROWS; }
4677			| /*EMPTY*/						{ $$ = ONCOMMIT_NOOP; }
4678		;
4679
4680OptTableSpace:   TABLESPACE name					{ $$ = $2; }
4681			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
4682		;
4683
4684OptConsTableSpace:   USING INDEX TABLESPACE name	{ $$ = $4; }
4685			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
4686		;
4687
4688ExistingIndex:   USING INDEX name					{ $$ = $3; }
4689		;
4690
4691/*****************************************************************************
4692 *
4693 *		QUERY :
4694 *				CREATE STATISTICS [[IF NOT EXISTS] stats_name] [(stat types)]
4695 *					ON expression-list FROM from_list
4696 *
4697 * Note: the expectation here is that the clauses after ON are a subset of
4698 * SELECT syntax, allowing for expressions and joined tables, and probably
4699 * someday a WHERE clause.  Much less than that is currently implemented,
4700 * but the grammar accepts it and then we'll throw FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED
4701 * errors as necessary at execution.
4702 *
4703 * Statistics name is optional unless IF NOT EXISTS is specified.
4704 *
4705 *****************************************************************************/
4706
4707CreateStatsStmt:
4708			CREATE STATISTICS opt_qualified_name
4709			opt_name_list ON stats_params FROM from_list
4710				{
4711					CreateStatsStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStatsStmt);
4712
4713					n->defnames = $3;
4714					n->stat_types = $4;
4715					n->exprs = $6;
4716					n->relations = $8;
4717					n->stxcomment = NULL;
4718					n->if_not_exists = false;
4719					$$ = (Node *) n;
4720				}
4721			| CREATE STATISTICS IF_P NOT EXISTS any_name
4722			opt_name_list ON stats_params FROM from_list
4723				{
4724					CreateStatsStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStatsStmt);
4725
4726					n->defnames = $6;
4727					n->stat_types = $7;
4728					n->exprs = $9;
4729					n->relations = $11;
4730					n->stxcomment = NULL;
4731					n->if_not_exists = true;
4732					$$ = (Node *) n;
4733				}
4734			;
4735
4736/*
4737 * Statistics attributes can be either simple column references, or arbitrary
4738 * expressions in parens.  For compatibility with index attributes permitted
4739 * in CREATE INDEX, we allow an expression that's just a function call to be
4740 * written without parens.
4741 */
4742
4743stats_params:	stats_param							{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
4744			| stats_params ',' stats_param			{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
4745		;
4746
4747stats_param:	ColId
4748				{
4749					$$ = makeNode(StatsElem);
4750					$$->name = $1;
4751					$$->expr = NULL;
4752				}
4753			| func_expr_windowless
4754				{
4755					$$ = makeNode(StatsElem);
4756					$$->name = NULL;
4757					$$->expr = $1;
4758				}
4759			| '(' a_expr ')'
4760				{
4761					$$ = makeNode(StatsElem);
4762					$$->name = NULL;
4763					$$->expr = $2;
4764				}
4765		;
4766
4767/*****************************************************************************
4768 *
4769 *		QUERY :
4770 *				ALTER STATISTICS [IF EXISTS] stats_name
4771 *					SET STATISTICS  <SignedIconst>
4772 *
4773 *****************************************************************************/
4774
4775AlterStatsStmt:
4776			ALTER STATISTICS any_name SET STATISTICS set_statistics_value
4777				{
4778					AlterStatsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterStatsStmt);
4779
4780					n->defnames = $3;
4781					n->missing_ok = false;
4782					n->stxstattarget = $6;
4783					$$ = (Node *) n;
4784				}
4785			| ALTER STATISTICS IF_P EXISTS any_name SET STATISTICS set_statistics_value
4786				{
4787					AlterStatsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterStatsStmt);
4788
4789					n->defnames = $5;
4790					n->missing_ok = true;
4791					n->stxstattarget = $8;
4792					$$ = (Node *) n;
4793				}
4794			;
4795
4796/*****************************************************************************
4797 *
4798 *		QUERY :
4799 *				CREATE TABLE relname AS SelectStmt [ WITH [NO] DATA ]
4800 *
4801 *
4802 * Note: SELECT ... INTO is a now-deprecated alternative for this.
4803 *
4804 *****************************************************************************/
4805
4806CreateAsStmt:
4807		CREATE OptTemp TABLE create_as_target AS SelectStmt opt_with_data
4808				{
4809					CreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);
4810
4811					ctas->query = $6;
4812					ctas->into = $4;
4813					ctas->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;
4814					ctas->is_select_into = false;
4815					ctas->if_not_exists = false;
4816					/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */
4817					$4->rel->relpersistence = $2;
4818					$4->skipData = !($7);
4819					$$ = (Node *) ctas;
4820				}
4821		| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS create_as_target AS SelectStmt opt_with_data
4822				{
4823					CreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);
4824
4825					ctas->query = $9;
4826					ctas->into = $7;
4827					ctas->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;
4828					ctas->is_select_into = false;
4829					ctas->if_not_exists = true;
4830					/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */
4831					$7->rel->relpersistence = $2;
4832					$7->skipData = !($10);
4833					$$ = (Node *) ctas;
4834				}
4835		;
4836
4837create_as_target:
4838			qualified_name opt_column_list table_access_method_clause
4839			OptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace
4840				{
4841					$$ = makeNode(IntoClause);
4842					$$->rel = $1;
4843					$$->colNames = $2;
4844					$$->accessMethod = $3;
4845					$$->options = $4;
4846					$$->onCommit = $5;
4847					$$->tableSpaceName = $6;
4848					$$->viewQuery = NULL;
4849					$$->skipData = false;		/* might get changed later */
4850				}
4851		;
4852
4853opt_with_data:
4854			WITH DATA_P								{ $$ = true; }
4855			| WITH NO DATA_P						{ $$ = false; }
4856			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = true; }
4857		;
4858
4859
4860/*****************************************************************************
4861 *
4862 *		QUERY :
4863 *				CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW relname AS SelectStmt
4864 *
4865 *****************************************************************************/
4866
4867CreateMatViewStmt:
4868		CREATE OptNoLog MATERIALIZED VIEW create_mv_target AS SelectStmt opt_with_data
4869				{
4870					CreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);
4871
4872					ctas->query = $7;
4873					ctas->into = $5;
4874					ctas->objtype = OBJECT_MATVIEW;
4875					ctas->is_select_into = false;
4876					ctas->if_not_exists = false;
4877					/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */
4878					$5->rel->relpersistence = $2;
4879					$5->skipData = !($8);
4880					$$ = (Node *) ctas;
4881				}
4882		| CREATE OptNoLog MATERIALIZED VIEW IF_P NOT EXISTS create_mv_target AS SelectStmt opt_with_data
4883				{
4884					CreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);
4885
4886					ctas->query = $10;
4887					ctas->into = $8;
4888					ctas->objtype = OBJECT_MATVIEW;
4889					ctas->is_select_into = false;
4890					ctas->if_not_exists = true;
4891					/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */
4892					$8->rel->relpersistence = $2;
4893					$8->skipData = !($11);
4894					$$ = (Node *) ctas;
4895				}
4896		;
4897
4898create_mv_target:
4899			qualified_name opt_column_list table_access_method_clause opt_reloptions OptTableSpace
4900				{
4901					$$ = makeNode(IntoClause);
4902					$$->rel = $1;
4903					$$->colNames = $2;
4904					$$->accessMethod = $3;
4905					$$->options = $4;
4906					$$->onCommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;
4907					$$->tableSpaceName = $5;
4908					$$->viewQuery = NULL;		/* filled at analysis time */
4909					$$->skipData = false;		/* might get changed later */
4910				}
4911		;
4912
4913OptNoLog:	UNLOGGED					{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_UNLOGGED; }
4914			| /*EMPTY*/					{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT; }
4915		;
4916
4917
4918/*****************************************************************************
4919 *
4920 *		QUERY :
4921 *				REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW qualified_name
4922 *
4923 *****************************************************************************/
4924
4925RefreshMatViewStmt:
4926			REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW opt_concurrently qualified_name opt_with_data
4927				{
4928					RefreshMatViewStmt *n = makeNode(RefreshMatViewStmt);
4929
4930					n->concurrent = $4;
4931					n->relation = $5;
4932					n->skipData = !($6);
4933					$$ = (Node *) n;
4934				}
4935		;
4936
4937
4938/*****************************************************************************
4939 *
4940 *		QUERY :
4941 *				CREATE SEQUENCE seqname
4942 *				ALTER SEQUENCE seqname
4943 *
4944 *****************************************************************************/
4945
4946CreateSeqStmt:
4947			CREATE OptTemp SEQUENCE qualified_name OptSeqOptList
4948				{
4949					CreateSeqStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSeqStmt);
4950
4951					$4->relpersistence = $2;
4952					n->sequence = $4;
4953					n->options = $5;
4954					n->ownerId = InvalidOid;
4955					n->if_not_exists = false;
4956					$$ = (Node *) n;
4957				}
4958			| CREATE OptTemp SEQUENCE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name OptSeqOptList
4959				{
4960					CreateSeqStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSeqStmt);
4961
4962					$7->relpersistence = $2;
4963					n->sequence = $7;
4964					n->options = $8;
4965					n->ownerId = InvalidOid;
4966					n->if_not_exists = true;
4967					$$ = (Node *) n;
4968				}
4969		;
4970
4971AlterSeqStmt:
4972			ALTER SEQUENCE qualified_name SeqOptList
4973				{
4974					AlterSeqStmt *n = makeNode(AlterSeqStmt);
4975
4976					n->sequence = $3;
4977					n->options = $4;
4978					n->missing_ok = false;
4979					$$ = (Node *) n;
4980				}
4981			| ALTER SEQUENCE IF_P EXISTS qualified_name SeqOptList
4982				{
4983					AlterSeqStmt *n = makeNode(AlterSeqStmt);
4984
4985					n->sequence = $5;
4986					n->options = $6;
4987					n->missing_ok = true;
4988					$$ = (Node *) n;
4989				}
4990
4991		;
4992
4993OptSeqOptList: SeqOptList							{ $$ = $1; }
4994			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
4995		;
4996
4997OptParenthesizedSeqOptList: '(' SeqOptList ')'		{ $$ = $2; }
4998			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
4999		;
5000
5001SeqOptList: SeqOptElem								{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
5002			| SeqOptList SeqOptElem					{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
5003		;
5004
5005SeqOptElem: AS SimpleTypename
5006				{
5007					$$ = makeDefElem("as", (Node *) $2, @1);
5008				}
5009			| CACHE NumericOnly
5010				{
5011					$$ = makeDefElem("cache", (Node *) $2, @1);
5012				}
5013			| CYCLE
5014				{
5015					$$ = makeDefElem("cycle", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);
5016				}
5017			| NO CYCLE
5018				{
5019					$$ = makeDefElem("cycle", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);
5020				}
5021			| INCREMENT opt_by NumericOnly
5022				{
5023					$$ = makeDefElem("increment", (Node *) $3, @1);
5024				}
5025			| LOGGED
5026				{
5027					$$ = makeDefElem("logged", NULL, @1);
5028				}
5029			| MAXVALUE NumericOnly
5030				{
5031					$$ = makeDefElem("maxvalue", (Node *) $2, @1);
5032				}
5033			| MINVALUE NumericOnly
5034				{
5035					$$ = makeDefElem("minvalue", (Node *) $2, @1);
5036				}
5037			| NO MAXVALUE
5038				{
5039					$$ = makeDefElem("maxvalue", NULL, @1);
5040				}
5041			| NO MINVALUE
5042				{
5043					$$ = makeDefElem("minvalue", NULL, @1);
5044				}
5045			| OWNED BY any_name
5046				{
5047					$$ = makeDefElem("owned_by", (Node *) $3, @1);
5048				}
5049			| SEQUENCE NAME_P any_name
5050				{
5051					$$ = makeDefElem("sequence_name", (Node *) $3, @1);
5052				}
5053			| START opt_with NumericOnly
5054				{
5055					$$ = makeDefElem("start", (Node *) $3, @1);
5056				}
5057			| RESTART
5058				{
5059					$$ = makeDefElem("restart", NULL, @1);
5060				}
5061			| RESTART opt_with NumericOnly
5062				{
5063					$$ = makeDefElem("restart", (Node *) $3, @1);
5064				}
5065			| UNLOGGED
5066				{
5067					$$ = makeDefElem("unlogged", NULL, @1);
5068				}
5069		;
5070
5071opt_by:		BY
5072			| /* EMPTY */
5073	  ;
5074
5075NumericOnly:
5076			FCONST								{ $$ = (Node *) makeFloat($1); }
5077			| '+' FCONST						{ $$ = (Node *) makeFloat($2); }
5078			| '-' FCONST
5079				{
5080					Float	   *f = makeFloat($2);
5081
5082					doNegateFloat(f);
5083					$$ = (Node *) f;
5084				}
5085			| SignedIconst						{ $$ = (Node *) makeInteger($1); }
5086		;
5087
5088NumericOnly_list:	NumericOnly						{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
5089				| NumericOnly_list ',' NumericOnly	{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
5090		;
5091
5092/*****************************************************************************
5093 *
5094 *		QUERIES :
5095 *				CREATE [OR REPLACE] [TRUSTED] [PROCEDURAL] LANGUAGE ...
5096 *				DROP [PROCEDURAL] LANGUAGE ...
5097 *
5098 *****************************************************************************/
5099
5100CreatePLangStmt:
5101			CREATE opt_or_replace opt_trusted opt_procedural LANGUAGE name
5102			{
5103				/*
5104				 * We now interpret parameterless CREATE LANGUAGE as
5105				 * CREATE EXTENSION.  "OR REPLACE" is silently translated
5106				 * to "IF NOT EXISTS", which isn't quite the same, but
5107				 * seems more useful than throwing an error.  We just
5108				 * ignore TRUSTED, as the previous code would have too.
5109				 */
5110				CreateExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateExtensionStmt);
5111
5112				n->if_not_exists = $2;
5113				n->extname = $6;
5114				n->options = NIL;
5115				$$ = (Node *) n;
5116			}
5117			| CREATE opt_or_replace opt_trusted opt_procedural LANGUAGE name
5118			  HANDLER handler_name opt_inline_handler opt_validator
5119			{
5120				CreatePLangStmt *n = makeNode(CreatePLangStmt);
5121
5122				n->replace = $2;
5123				n->plname = $6;
5124				n->plhandler = $8;
5125				n->plinline = $9;
5126				n->plvalidator = $10;
5127				n->pltrusted = $3;
5128				$$ = (Node *) n;
5129			}
5130		;
5131
5132opt_trusted:
5133			TRUSTED									{ $$ = true; }
5134			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = false; }
5135		;
5136
5137/* This ought to be just func_name, but that causes reduce/reduce conflicts
5138 * (CREATE LANGUAGE is the only place where func_name isn't followed by '(').
5139 * Work around by using simple names, instead.
5140 */
5141handler_name:
5142			name						{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }
5143			| name attrs				{ $$ = lcons(makeString($1), $2); }
5144		;
5145
5146opt_inline_handler:
5147			INLINE_P handler_name					{ $$ = $2; }
5148			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
5149		;
5150
5151validator_clause:
5152			VALIDATOR handler_name					{ $$ = $2; }
5153			| NO VALIDATOR							{ $$ = NIL; }
5154		;
5155
5156opt_validator:
5157			validator_clause						{ $$ = $1; }
5158			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
5159		;
5160
5161opt_procedural:
5162			PROCEDURAL
5163			| /*EMPTY*/
5164		;
5165
5166/*****************************************************************************
5167 *
5168 *		QUERY:
5169 *             CREATE TABLESPACE tablespace LOCATION '/path/to/tablespace/'
5170 *
5171 *****************************************************************************/
5172
5173CreateTableSpaceStmt: CREATE TABLESPACE name OptTableSpaceOwner LOCATION Sconst opt_reloptions
5174				{
5175					CreateTableSpaceStmt *n = makeNode(CreateTableSpaceStmt);
5176
5177					n->tablespacename = $3;
5178					n->owner = $4;
5179					n->location = $6;
5180					n->options = $7;
5181					$$ = (Node *) n;
5182				}
5183		;
5184
5185OptTableSpaceOwner: OWNER RoleSpec		{ $$ = $2; }
5186			| /*EMPTY */				{ $$ = NULL; }
5187		;
5188
5189/*****************************************************************************
5190 *
5191 *		QUERY :
5192 *				DROP TABLESPACE <tablespace>
5193 *
5194 *		No need for drop behaviour as we cannot implement dependencies for
5195 *		objects in other databases; we can only support RESTRICT.
5196 *
5197 ****************************************************************************/
5198
5199DropTableSpaceStmt: DROP TABLESPACE name
5200				{
5201					DropTableSpaceStmt *n = makeNode(DropTableSpaceStmt);
5202
5203					n->tablespacename = $3;
5204					n->missing_ok = false;
5205					$$ = (Node *) n;
5206				}
5207				|  DROP TABLESPACE IF_P EXISTS name
5208				{
5209					DropTableSpaceStmt *n = makeNode(DropTableSpaceStmt);
5210
5211					n->tablespacename = $5;
5212					n->missing_ok = true;
5213					$$ = (Node *) n;
5214				}
5215		;
5216
5217/*****************************************************************************
5218 *
5219 *		QUERY:
5220 *             CREATE EXTENSION extension
5221 *             [ WITH ] [ SCHEMA schema ] [ VERSION version ]
5222 *
5223 *****************************************************************************/
5224
5225CreateExtensionStmt: CREATE EXTENSION name opt_with create_extension_opt_list
5226				{
5227					CreateExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateExtensionStmt);
5228
5229					n->extname = $3;
5230					n->if_not_exists = false;
5231					n->options = $5;
5232					$$ = (Node *) n;
5233				}
5234				| CREATE EXTENSION IF_P NOT EXISTS name opt_with create_extension_opt_list
5235				{
5236					CreateExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateExtensionStmt);
5237
5238					n->extname = $6;
5239					n->if_not_exists = true;
5240					n->options = $8;
5241					$$ = (Node *) n;
5242				}
5243		;
5244
5245create_extension_opt_list:
5246			create_extension_opt_list create_extension_opt_item
5247				{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
5248			| /* EMPTY */
5249				{ $$ = NIL; }
5250		;
5251
5252create_extension_opt_item:
5253			SCHEMA name
5254				{
5255					$$ = makeDefElem("schema", (Node *) makeString($2), @1);
5256				}
5257			| VERSION_P NonReservedWord_or_Sconst
5258				{
5259					$$ = makeDefElem("new_version", (Node *) makeString($2), @1);
5260				}
5261			| FROM NonReservedWord_or_Sconst
5262				{
5263					ereport(ERROR,
5264							(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
5265							 errmsg("CREATE EXTENSION ... FROM is no longer supported"),
5266							 parser_errposition(@1)));
5267				}
5268			| CASCADE
5269				{
5270					$$ = makeDefElem("cascade", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);
5271				}
5272		;
5273
5274/*****************************************************************************
5275 *
5276 * ALTER EXTENSION name UPDATE [ TO version ]
5277 *
5278 *****************************************************************************/
5279
5280AlterExtensionStmt: ALTER EXTENSION name UPDATE alter_extension_opt_list
5281				{
5282					AlterExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionStmt);
5283
5284					n->extname = $3;
5285					n->options = $5;
5286					$$ = (Node *) n;
5287				}
5288		;
5289
5290alter_extension_opt_list:
5291			alter_extension_opt_list alter_extension_opt_item
5292				{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
5293			| /* EMPTY */
5294				{ $$ = NIL; }
5295		;
5296
5297alter_extension_opt_item:
5298			TO NonReservedWord_or_Sconst
5299				{
5300					$$ = makeDefElem("new_version", (Node *) makeString($2), @1);
5301				}
5302		;
5303
5304/*****************************************************************************
5305 *
5306 * ALTER EXTENSION name ADD/DROP object-identifier
5307 *
5308 *****************************************************************************/
5309
5310AlterExtensionContentsStmt:
5311			ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop object_type_name name
5312				{
5313					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5314
5315					n->extname = $3;
5316					n->action = $4;
5317					n->objtype = $5;
5318					n->object = (Node *) makeString($6);
5319					$$ = (Node *) n;
5320				}
5321			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop object_type_any_name any_name
5322				{
5323					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5324
5325					n->extname = $3;
5326					n->action = $4;
5327					n->objtype = $5;
5328					n->object = (Node *) $6;
5329					$$ = (Node *) n;
5330				}
5331			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop AGGREGATE aggregate_with_argtypes
5332				{
5333					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5334
5335					n->extname = $3;
5336					n->action = $4;
5337					n->objtype = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;
5338					n->object = (Node *) $6;
5339					$$ = (Node *) n;
5340				}
5341			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop CAST '(' Typename AS Typename ')'
5342				{
5343					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5344
5345					n->extname = $3;
5346					n->action = $4;
5347					n->objtype = OBJECT_CAST;
5348					n->object = (Node *) list_make2($7, $9);
5349					$$ = (Node *) n;
5350				}
5351			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop DOMAIN_P Typename
5352				{
5353					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5354
5355					n->extname = $3;
5356					n->action = $4;
5357					n->objtype = OBJECT_DOMAIN;
5358					n->object = (Node *) $6;
5359					$$ = (Node *) n;
5360				}
5361			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop FUNCTION function_with_argtypes
5362				{
5363					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5364
5365					n->extname = $3;
5366					n->action = $4;
5367					n->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;
5368					n->object = (Node *) $6;
5369					$$ = (Node *) n;
5370				}
5371			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop OPERATOR operator_with_argtypes
5372				{
5373					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5374
5375					n->extname = $3;
5376					n->action = $4;
5377					n->objtype = OBJECT_OPERATOR;
5378					n->object = (Node *) $6;
5379					$$ = (Node *) n;
5380				}
5381			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop OPERATOR CLASS any_name USING name
5382				{
5383					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5384
5385					n->extname = $3;
5386					n->action = $4;
5387					n->objtype = OBJECT_OPCLASS;
5388					n->object = (Node *) lcons(makeString($9), $7);
5389					$$ = (Node *) n;
5390				}
5391			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name
5392				{
5393					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5394
5395					n->extname = $3;
5396					n->action = $4;
5397					n->objtype = OBJECT_OPFAMILY;
5398					n->object = (Node *) lcons(makeString($9), $7);
5399					$$ = (Node *) n;
5400				}
5401			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop PROCEDURE function_with_argtypes
5402				{
5403					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5404
5405					n->extname = $3;
5406					n->action = $4;
5407					n->objtype = OBJECT_PROCEDURE;
5408					n->object = (Node *) $6;
5409					$$ = (Node *) n;
5410				}
5411			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop ROUTINE function_with_argtypes
5412				{
5413					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5414
5415					n->extname = $3;
5416					n->action = $4;
5417					n->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;
5418					n->object = (Node *) $6;
5419					$$ = (Node *) n;
5420				}
5421			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop TRANSFORM FOR Typename LANGUAGE name
5422				{
5423					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5424
5425					n->extname = $3;
5426					n->action = $4;
5427					n->objtype = OBJECT_TRANSFORM;
5428					n->object = (Node *) list_make2($7, makeString($9));
5429					$$ = (Node *) n;
5430				}
5431			| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop TYPE_P Typename
5432				{
5433					AlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);
5434
5435					n->extname = $3;
5436					n->action = $4;
5437					n->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;
5438					n->object = (Node *) $6;
5439					$$ = (Node *) n;
5440				}
5441		;
5442
5443/*****************************************************************************
5444 *
5445 *		QUERY:
5446 *             CREATE FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER name options
5447 *
5448 *****************************************************************************/
5449
5450CreateFdwStmt: CREATE FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name opt_fdw_options create_generic_options
5451				{
5452					CreateFdwStmt *n = makeNode(CreateFdwStmt);
5453
5454					n->fdwname = $5;
5455					n->func_options = $6;
5456					n->options = $7;
5457					$$ = (Node *) n;
5458				}
5459		;
5460
5461fdw_option:
5462			HANDLER handler_name				{ $$ = makeDefElem("handler", (Node *) $2, @1); }
5463			| NO HANDLER						{ $$ = makeDefElem("handler", NULL, @1); }
5464			| VALIDATOR handler_name			{ $$ = makeDefElem("validator", (Node *) $2, @1); }
5465			| NO VALIDATOR						{ $$ = makeDefElem("validator", NULL, @1); }
5466		;
5467
5468fdw_options:
5469			fdw_option							{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
5470			| fdw_options fdw_option			{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
5471		;
5472
5473opt_fdw_options:
5474			fdw_options							{ $$ = $1; }
5475			| /*EMPTY*/							{ $$ = NIL; }
5476		;
5477
5478/*****************************************************************************
5479 *
5480 *		QUERY :
5481 *				ALTER FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER name options
5482 *
5483 ****************************************************************************/
5484
5485AlterFdwStmt: ALTER FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name opt_fdw_options alter_generic_options
5486				{
5487					AlterFdwStmt *n = makeNode(AlterFdwStmt);
5488
5489					n->fdwname = $5;
5490					n->func_options = $6;
5491					n->options = $7;
5492					$$ = (Node *) n;
5493				}
5494			| ALTER FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name fdw_options
5495				{
5496					AlterFdwStmt *n = makeNode(AlterFdwStmt);
5497
5498					n->fdwname = $5;
5499					n->func_options = $6;
5500					n->options = NIL;
5501					$$ = (Node *) n;
5502				}
5503		;
5504
5505/* Options definition for CREATE FDW, SERVER and USER MAPPING */
5506create_generic_options:
5507			OPTIONS '(' generic_option_list ')'			{ $$ = $3; }
5508			| /*EMPTY*/									{ $$ = NIL; }
5509		;
5510
5511generic_option_list:
5512			generic_option_elem
5513				{
5514					$$ = list_make1($1);
5515				}
5516			| generic_option_list ',' generic_option_elem
5517				{
5518					$$ = lappend($1, $3);
5519				}
5520		;
5521
5522/* Options definition for ALTER FDW, SERVER and USER MAPPING */
5523alter_generic_options:
5524			OPTIONS	'(' alter_generic_option_list ')'		{ $$ = $3; }
5525		;
5526
5527alter_generic_option_list:
5528			alter_generic_option_elem
5529				{
5530					$$ = list_make1($1);
5531				}
5532			| alter_generic_option_list ',' alter_generic_option_elem
5533				{
5534					$$ = lappend($1, $3);
5535				}
5536		;
5537
5538alter_generic_option_elem:
5539			generic_option_elem
5540				{
5541					$$ = $1;
5542				}
5543			| SET generic_option_elem
5544				{
5545					$$ = $2;
5546					$$->defaction = DEFELEM_SET;
5547				}
5548			| ADD_P generic_option_elem
5549				{
5550					$$ = $2;
5551					$$->defaction = DEFELEM_ADD;
5552				}
