5553			| DROP generic_option_name
5554				{
5555					$$ = makeDefElemExtended(NULL, $2, NULL, DEFELEM_DROP, @2);
5556				}
5557		;
5558
5559generic_option_elem:
5560			generic_option_name generic_option_arg
5561				{
5562					$$ = makeDefElem($1, $2, @1);
5563				}
5564		;
5565
5566generic_option_name:
5567				ColLabel			{ $$ = $1; }
5568		;
5569
5570/* We could use def_arg here, but the spec only requires string literals */
5571generic_option_arg:
5572				Sconst				{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }
5573		;
5574
5575/*****************************************************************************
5576 *
5577 *		QUERY:
5578 *             CREATE SERVER name [TYPE] [VERSION] [OPTIONS]
5579 *
5580 *****************************************************************************/
5581
5582CreateForeignServerStmt: CREATE SERVER name opt_type opt_foreign_server_version
5583						 FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name create_generic_options
5584				{
5585					CreateForeignServerStmt *n = makeNode(CreateForeignServerStmt);
5586
5587					n->servername = $3;
5588					n->servertype = $4;
5589					n->version = $5;
5590					n->fdwname = $9;
5591					n->options = $10;
5592					n->if_not_exists = false;
5593					$$ = (Node *) n;
5594				}
5595				| CREATE SERVER IF_P NOT EXISTS name opt_type opt_foreign_server_version
5596						 FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name create_generic_options
5597				{
5598					CreateForeignServerStmt *n = makeNode(CreateForeignServerStmt);
5599
5600					n->servername = $6;
5601					n->servertype = $7;
5602					n->version = $8;
5603					n->fdwname = $12;
5604					n->options = $13;
5605					n->if_not_exists = true;
5606					$$ = (Node *) n;
5607				}
5608		;
5609
5610opt_type:
5611			TYPE_P Sconst			{ $$ = $2; }
5612			| /*EMPTY*/				{ $$ = NULL; }
5613		;
5614
5615
5616foreign_server_version:
5617			VERSION_P Sconst		{ $$ = $2; }
5618		|	VERSION_P NULL_P		{ $$ = NULL; }
5619		;
5620
5621opt_foreign_server_version:
5622			foreign_server_version	{ $$ = $1; }
5623			| /*EMPTY*/				{ $$ = NULL; }
5624		;
5625
5626/*****************************************************************************
5627 *
5628 *		QUERY :
5629 *				ALTER SERVER name [VERSION] [OPTIONS]
5630 *
5631 ****************************************************************************/
5632
5633AlterForeignServerStmt: ALTER SERVER name foreign_server_version alter_generic_options
5634				{
5635					AlterForeignServerStmt *n = makeNode(AlterForeignServerStmt);
5636
5637					n->servername = $3;
5638					n->version = $4;
5639					n->options = $5;
5640					n->has_version = true;
5641					$$ = (Node *) n;
5642				}
5643			| ALTER SERVER name foreign_server_version
5644				{
5645					AlterForeignServerStmt *n = makeNode(AlterForeignServerStmt);
5646
5647					n->servername = $3;
5648					n->version = $4;
5649					n->has_version = true;
5650					$$ = (Node *) n;
5651				}
5652			| ALTER SERVER name alter_generic_options
5653				{
5654					AlterForeignServerStmt *n = makeNode(AlterForeignServerStmt);
5655
5656					n->servername = $3;
5657					n->options = $4;
5658					$$ = (Node *) n;
5659				}
5660		;
5661
5662/*****************************************************************************
5663 *
5664 *		QUERY:
5665 *             CREATE FOREIGN TABLE relname (...) SERVER name (...)
5666 *
5667 *****************************************************************************/
5668
5669CreateForeignTableStmt:
5670		CREATE FOREIGN TABLE qualified_name
5671			'(' OptTableElementList ')'
5672			OptInherit SERVER name create_generic_options
5673				{
5674					CreateForeignTableStmt *n = makeNode(CreateForeignTableStmt);
5675
5676					$4->relpersistence = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT;
5677					n->base.relation = $4;
5678					n->base.tableElts = $6;
5679					n->base.inhRelations = $8;
5680					n->base.ofTypename = NULL;
5681					n->base.constraints = NIL;
5682					n->base.options = NIL;
5683					n->base.oncommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;
5684					n->base.tablespacename = NULL;
5685					n->base.if_not_exists = false;
5686					/* FDW-specific data */
5687					n->servername = $10;
5688					n->options = $11;
5689					$$ = (Node *) n;
5690				}
5691		| CREATE FOREIGN TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name
5692			'(' OptTableElementList ')'
5693			OptInherit SERVER name create_generic_options
5694				{
5695					CreateForeignTableStmt *n = makeNode(CreateForeignTableStmt);
5696
5697					$7->relpersistence = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT;
5698					n->base.relation = $7;
5699					n->base.tableElts = $9;
5700					n->base.inhRelations = $11;
5701					n->base.ofTypename = NULL;
5702					n->base.constraints = NIL;
5703					n->base.options = NIL;
5704					n->base.oncommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;
5705					n->base.tablespacename = NULL;
5706					n->base.if_not_exists = true;
5707					/* FDW-specific data */
5708					n->servername = $13;
5709					n->options = $14;
5710					$$ = (Node *) n;
5711				}
5712		| CREATE FOREIGN TABLE qualified_name
5713			PARTITION OF qualified_name OptTypedTableElementList PartitionBoundSpec
5714			SERVER name create_generic_options
5715				{
5716					CreateForeignTableStmt *n = makeNode(CreateForeignTableStmt);
5717
5718					$4->relpersistence = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT;
5719					n->base.relation = $4;
5720					n->base.inhRelations = list_make1($7);
5721					n->base.tableElts = $8;
5722					n->base.partbound = $9;
5723					n->base.ofTypename = NULL;
5724					n->base.constraints = NIL;
5725					n->base.options = NIL;
5726					n->base.oncommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;
5727					n->base.tablespacename = NULL;
5728					n->base.if_not_exists = false;
5729					/* FDW-specific data */
5730					n->servername = $11;
5731					n->options = $12;
5732					$$ = (Node *) n;
5733				}
5734		| CREATE FOREIGN TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name
5735			PARTITION OF qualified_name OptTypedTableElementList PartitionBoundSpec
5736			SERVER name create_generic_options
5737				{
5738					CreateForeignTableStmt *n = makeNode(CreateForeignTableStmt);
5739
5740					$7->relpersistence = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT;
5741					n->base.relation = $7;
5742					n->base.inhRelations = list_make1($10);
5743					n->base.tableElts = $11;
5744					n->base.partbound = $12;
5745					n->base.ofTypename = NULL;
5746					n->base.constraints = NIL;
5747					n->base.options = NIL;
5748					n->base.oncommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;
5749					n->base.tablespacename = NULL;
5750					n->base.if_not_exists = true;
5751					/* FDW-specific data */
5752					n->servername = $14;
5753					n->options = $15;
5754					$$ = (Node *) n;
5755				}
5756		;
5757
5758/*****************************************************************************
5759 *
5760 *		QUERY:
5761 *				IMPORT FOREIGN SCHEMA remote_schema
5762 *				[ { LIMIT TO | EXCEPT } ( table_list ) ]
5763 *				FROM SERVER server_name INTO local_schema [ OPTIONS (...) ]
5764 *
5765 ****************************************************************************/
5766
5767ImportForeignSchemaStmt:
5768		IMPORT_P FOREIGN SCHEMA name import_qualification
5769		  FROM SERVER name INTO name create_generic_options
5770			{
5771				ImportForeignSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(ImportForeignSchemaStmt);
5772
5773				n->server_name = $8;
5774				n->remote_schema = $4;
5775				n->local_schema = $10;
5776				n->list_type = $5->type;
5777				n->table_list = $5->table_names;
5778				n->options = $11;
5779				$$ = (Node *) n;
5780			}
5781		;
5782
5783import_qualification_type:
5784		LIMIT TO				{ $$ = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_LIMIT_TO; }
5785		| EXCEPT				{ $$ = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_EXCEPT; }
5786		;
5787
5788import_qualification:
5789		import_qualification_type '(' relation_expr_list ')'
5790			{
5791				ImportQual *n = (ImportQual *) palloc(sizeof(ImportQual));
5792
5793				n->type = $1;
5794				n->table_names = $3;
5795				$$ = n;
5796			}
5797		| /*EMPTY*/
5798			{
5799				ImportQual *n = (ImportQual *) palloc(sizeof(ImportQual));
5800				n->type = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_ALL;
5801				n->table_names = NIL;
5802				$$ = n;
5803			}
5804		;
5805
5806/*****************************************************************************
5807 *
5808 *		QUERY:
5809 *             CREATE USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name [OPTIONS]
5810 *
5811 *****************************************************************************/
5812
5813CreateUserMappingStmt: CREATE USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name create_generic_options
5814				{
5815					CreateUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(CreateUserMappingStmt);
5816
5817					n->user = $5;
5818					n->servername = $7;
5819					n->options = $8;
5820					n->if_not_exists = false;
5821					$$ = (Node *) n;
5822				}
5823				| CREATE USER MAPPING IF_P NOT EXISTS FOR auth_ident SERVER name create_generic_options
5824				{
5825					CreateUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(CreateUserMappingStmt);
5826
5827					n->user = $8;
5828					n->servername = $10;
5829					n->options = $11;
5830					n->if_not_exists = true;
5831					$$ = (Node *) n;
5832				}
5833		;
5834
5835/* User mapping authorization identifier */
5836auth_ident: RoleSpec			{ $$ = $1; }
5837			| USER				{ $$ = makeRoleSpec(ROLESPEC_CURRENT_USER, @1); }
5838		;
5839
5840/*****************************************************************************
5841 *
5842 *		QUERY :
5843 *				DROP USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name
5844 *
5845 * XXX you'd think this should have a CASCADE/RESTRICT option, even if it's
5846 * only pro forma; but the SQL standard doesn't show one.
5847 ****************************************************************************/
5848
5849DropUserMappingStmt: DROP USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name
5850				{
5851					DropUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(DropUserMappingStmt);
5852
5853					n->user = $5;
5854					n->servername = $7;
5855					n->missing_ok = false;
5856					$$ = (Node *) n;
5857				}
5858				|  DROP USER MAPPING IF_P EXISTS FOR auth_ident SERVER name
5859				{
5860					DropUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(DropUserMappingStmt);
5861
5862					n->user = $7;
5863					n->servername = $9;
5864					n->missing_ok = true;
5865					$$ = (Node *) n;
5866				}
5867		;
5868
5869/*****************************************************************************
5870 *
5871 *		QUERY :
5872 *				ALTER USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name OPTIONS
5873 *
5874 ****************************************************************************/
5875
5876AlterUserMappingStmt: ALTER USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name alter_generic_options
5877				{
5878					AlterUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(AlterUserMappingStmt);
5879
5880					n->user = $5;
5881					n->servername = $7;
5882					n->options = $8;
5883					$$ = (Node *) n;
5884				}
5885		;
5886
5887/*****************************************************************************
5888 *
5889 *		QUERIES:
5890 *				CREATE POLICY name ON table
5891 *					[AS { PERMISSIVE | RESTRICTIVE } ]
5892 *					[FOR { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | DELETE } ]
5893 *					[TO role, ...]
5894 *					[USING (qual)] [WITH CHECK (with check qual)]
5895 *				ALTER POLICY name ON table [TO role, ...]
5896 *					[USING (qual)] [WITH CHECK (with check qual)]
5897 *
5898 *****************************************************************************/
5899
5900CreatePolicyStmt:
5901			CREATE POLICY name ON qualified_name RowSecurityDefaultPermissive
5902				RowSecurityDefaultForCmd RowSecurityDefaultToRole
5903				RowSecurityOptionalExpr RowSecurityOptionalWithCheck
5904				{
5905					CreatePolicyStmt *n = makeNode(CreatePolicyStmt);
5906
5907					n->policy_name = $3;
5908					n->table = $5;
5909					n->permissive = $6;
5910					n->cmd_name = $7;
5911					n->roles = $8;
5912					n->qual = $9;
5913					n->with_check = $10;
5914					$$ = (Node *) n;
5915				}
5916		;
5917
5918AlterPolicyStmt:
5919			ALTER POLICY name ON qualified_name RowSecurityOptionalToRole
5920				RowSecurityOptionalExpr RowSecurityOptionalWithCheck
5921				{
5922					AlterPolicyStmt *n = makeNode(AlterPolicyStmt);
5923
5924					n->policy_name = $3;
5925					n->table = $5;
5926					n->roles = $6;
5927					n->qual = $7;
5928					n->with_check = $8;
5929					$$ = (Node *) n;
5930				}
5931		;
5932
5933RowSecurityOptionalExpr:
5934			USING '(' a_expr ')'	{ $$ = $3; }
5935			| /* EMPTY */			{ $$ = NULL; }
5936		;
5937
5938RowSecurityOptionalWithCheck:
5939			WITH CHECK '(' a_expr ')'		{ $$ = $4; }
5940			| /* EMPTY */					{ $$ = NULL; }
5941		;
5942
5943RowSecurityDefaultToRole:
5944			TO role_list			{ $$ = $2; }
5945			| /* EMPTY */			{ $$ = list_make1(makeRoleSpec(ROLESPEC_PUBLIC, -1)); }
5946		;
5947
5948RowSecurityOptionalToRole:
5949			TO role_list			{ $$ = $2; }
5950			| /* EMPTY */			{ $$ = NULL; }
5951		;
5952
5953RowSecurityDefaultPermissive:
5954			AS IDENT
5955				{
5956					if (strcmp($2, "permissive") == 0)
5957						$$ = true;
5958					else if (strcmp($2, "restrictive") == 0)
5959						$$ = false;
5960					else
5961						ereport(ERROR,
5962								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
5963								 errmsg("unrecognized row security option \"%s\"", $2),
5964								 errhint("Only PERMISSIVE or RESTRICTIVE policies are supported currently."),
5965								 parser_errposition(@2)));
5966
5967				}
5968			| /* EMPTY */			{ $$ = true; }
5969		;
5970
5971RowSecurityDefaultForCmd:
5972			FOR row_security_cmd	{ $$ = $2; }
5973			| /* EMPTY */			{ $$ = "all"; }
5974		;
5975
5976row_security_cmd:
5977			ALL				{ $$ = "all"; }
5978		|	SELECT			{ $$ = "select"; }
5979		|	INSERT			{ $$ = "insert"; }
5980		|	UPDATE			{ $$ = "update"; }
5981		|	DELETE_P		{ $$ = "delete"; }
5982		;
5983
5984/*****************************************************************************
5985 *
5986 *		QUERY:
5987 *             CREATE ACCESS METHOD name HANDLER handler_name
5988 *
5989 *****************************************************************************/
5990
5991CreateAmStmt: CREATE ACCESS METHOD name TYPE_P am_type HANDLER handler_name
5992				{
5993					CreateAmStmt *n = makeNode(CreateAmStmt);
5994
5995					n->amname = $4;
5996					n->handler_name = $8;
5997					n->amtype = $6;
5998					$$ = (Node *) n;
5999				}
6000		;
6001
6002am_type:
6003			INDEX			{ $$ = AMTYPE_INDEX; }
6004		|	TABLE			{ $$ = AMTYPE_TABLE; }
6005		;
6006
6007/*****************************************************************************
6008 *
6009 *		QUERIES :
6010 *				CREATE TRIGGER ...
6011 *
6012 *****************************************************************************/
6013
6014CreateTrigStmt:
6015			CREATE opt_or_replace TRIGGER name TriggerActionTime TriggerEvents ON
6016			qualified_name TriggerReferencing TriggerForSpec TriggerWhen
6017			EXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' TriggerFuncArgs ')'
6018				{
6019					CreateTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateTrigStmt);
6020
6021					n->replace = $2;
6022					n->isconstraint = false;
6023					n->trigname = $4;
6024					n->relation = $8;
6025					n->funcname = $14;
6026					n->args = $16;
6027					n->row = $10;
6028					n->timing = $5;
6029					n->events = intVal(linitial($6));
6030					n->columns = (List *) lsecond($6);
6031					n->whenClause = $11;
6032					n->transitionRels = $9;
6033					n->deferrable = false;
6034					n->initdeferred = false;
6035					n->constrrel = NULL;
6036					$$ = (Node *) n;
6037				}
6038		  | CREATE opt_or_replace CONSTRAINT TRIGGER name AFTER TriggerEvents ON
6039			qualified_name OptConstrFromTable ConstraintAttributeSpec
6040			FOR EACH ROW TriggerWhen
6041			EXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' TriggerFuncArgs ')'
6042				{
6043					CreateTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateTrigStmt);
6044
6045					n->replace = $2;
6046					if (n->replace) /* not supported, see CreateTrigger */
6047						ereport(ERROR,
6048								(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
6049								 errmsg("CREATE OR REPLACE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER is not supported"),
6050								 parser_errposition(@1)));
6051					n->isconstraint = true;
6052					n->trigname = $5;
6053					n->relation = $9;
6054					n->funcname = $18;
6055					n->args = $20;
6056					n->row = true;
6057					n->timing = TRIGGER_TYPE_AFTER;
6058					n->events = intVal(linitial($7));
6059					n->columns = (List *) lsecond($7);
6060					n->whenClause = $15;
6061					n->transitionRels = NIL;
6062					processCASbits($11, @11, "TRIGGER",
6063								   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,
6064								   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);
6065					n->constrrel = $10;
6066					$$ = (Node *) n;
6067				}
6068		;
6069
6070TriggerActionTime:
6071			BEFORE								{ $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_BEFORE; }
6072			| AFTER								{ $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_AFTER; }
6073			| INSTEAD OF						{ $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_INSTEAD; }
6074		;
6075
6076TriggerEvents:
6077			TriggerOneEvent
6078				{ $$ = $1; }
6079			| TriggerEvents OR TriggerOneEvent
6080				{
6081					int			events1 = intVal(linitial($1));
6082					int			events2 = intVal(linitial($3));
6083					List	   *columns1 = (List *) lsecond($1);
6084					List	   *columns2 = (List *) lsecond($3);
6085
6086					if (events1 & events2)
6087						parser_yyerror("duplicate trigger events specified");
6088					/*
6089					 * concat'ing the columns lists loses information about
6090					 * which columns went with which event, but so long as
6091					 * only UPDATE carries columns and we disallow multiple
6092					 * UPDATE items, it doesn't matter.  Command execution
6093					 * should just ignore the columns for non-UPDATE events.
6094					 */
6095					$$ = list_make2(makeInteger(events1 | events2),
6096									list_concat(columns1, columns2));
6097				}
6098		;
6099
6100TriggerOneEvent:
6101			INSERT
6102				{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_INSERT), NIL); }
6103			| DELETE_P
6104				{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_DELETE), NIL); }
6105			| UPDATE
6106				{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_UPDATE), NIL); }
6107			| UPDATE OF columnList
6108				{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_UPDATE), $3); }
6109			| TRUNCATE
6110				{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_TRUNCATE), NIL); }
6111		;
6112
6113TriggerReferencing:
6114			REFERENCING TriggerTransitions			{ $$ = $2; }
6115			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
6116		;
6117
6118TriggerTransitions:
6119			TriggerTransition						{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
6120			| TriggerTransitions TriggerTransition	{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
6121		;
6122
6123TriggerTransition:
6124			TransitionOldOrNew TransitionRowOrTable opt_as TransitionRelName
6125				{
6126					TriggerTransition *n = makeNode(TriggerTransition);
6127
6128					n->name = $4;
6129					n->isNew = $1;
6130					n->isTable = $2;
6131					$$ = (Node *) n;
6132				}
6133		;
6134
6135TransitionOldOrNew:
6136			NEW										{ $$ = true; }
6137			| OLD									{ $$ = false; }
6138		;
6139
6140TransitionRowOrTable:
6141			TABLE									{ $$ = true; }
6142			/*
6143			 * According to the standard, lack of a keyword here implies ROW.
6144			 * Support for that would require prohibiting ROW entirely here,
6145			 * reserving the keyword ROW, and/or requiring AS (instead of
6146			 * allowing it to be optional, as the standard specifies) as the
6147			 * next token.  Requiring ROW seems cleanest and easiest to
6148			 * explain.
6149			 */
6150			| ROW									{ $$ = false; }
6151		;
6152
6153TransitionRelName:
6154			ColId									{ $$ = $1; }
6155		;
6156
6157TriggerForSpec:
6158			FOR TriggerForOptEach TriggerForType
6159				{
6160					$$ = $3;
6161				}
6162			| /* EMPTY */
6163				{
6164					/*
6165					 * If ROW/STATEMENT not specified, default to
6166					 * STATEMENT, per SQL
6167					 */
6168					$$ = false;
6169				}
6170		;
6171
6172TriggerForOptEach:
6173			EACH
6174			| /*EMPTY*/
6175		;
6176
6177TriggerForType:
6178			ROW										{ $$ = true; }
6179			| STATEMENT								{ $$ = false; }
6180		;
6181
6182TriggerWhen:
6183			WHEN '(' a_expr ')'						{ $$ = $3; }
6184			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
6185		;
6186
6187FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE:
6188			FUNCTION
6189		|	PROCEDURE
6190		;
6191
6192TriggerFuncArgs:
6193			TriggerFuncArg							{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
6194			| TriggerFuncArgs ',' TriggerFuncArg	{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
6195			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
6196		;
6197
6198TriggerFuncArg:
6199			Iconst
6200				{
6201					$$ = (Node *) makeString(psprintf("%d", $1));
6202				}
6203			| FCONST								{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }
6204			| Sconst								{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }
6205			| ColLabel								{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }
6206		;
6207
6208OptConstrFromTable:
6209			FROM qualified_name						{ $$ = $2; }
6210			| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NULL; }
6211		;
6212
6213ConstraintAttributeSpec:
6214			/*EMPTY*/
6215				{ $$ = 0; }
6216			| ConstraintAttributeSpec ConstraintAttributeElem
6217				{
6218					/*
6219					 * We must complain about conflicting options.
6220					 * We could, but choose not to, complain about redundant
6221					 * options (ie, where $2's bit is already set in $1).
6222					 */
6223					int		newspec = $1 | $2;
6224
6225					/* special message for this case */
6226					if ((newspec & (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED)) == (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED))
6227						ereport(ERROR,
6228								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
6229								 errmsg("constraint declared INITIALLY DEFERRED must be DEFERRABLE"),
6230								 parser_errposition(@2)));
6231					/* generic message for other conflicts */
6232					if ((newspec & (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_DEFERRABLE)) == (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_DEFERRABLE) ||
6233						(newspec & (CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED)) == (CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED) ||
6234						(newspec & (CAS_NOT_ENFORCED | CAS_ENFORCED)) == (CAS_NOT_ENFORCED | CAS_ENFORCED))
6235						ereport(ERROR,
6236								(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
6237								 errmsg("conflicting constraint properties"),
6238								 parser_errposition(@2)));
6239					$$ = newspec;
6240				}
6241		;
6242
6243ConstraintAttributeElem:
6244			NOT DEFERRABLE					{ $$ = CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE; }
6245			| DEFERRABLE					{ $$ = CAS_DEFERRABLE; }
6246			| INITIALLY IMMEDIATE			{ $$ = CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE; }
6247			| INITIALLY DEFERRED			{ $$ = CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED; }
6248			| NOT VALID						{ $$ = CAS_NOT_VALID; }
6249			| NO INHERIT					{ $$ = CAS_NO_INHERIT; }
6250			| NOT ENFORCED					{ $$ = CAS_NOT_ENFORCED; }
6251			| ENFORCED						{ $$ = CAS_ENFORCED; }
6252		;
6253
6254
6255/*****************************************************************************
6256 *
6257 *		QUERIES :
6258 *				CREATE EVENT TRIGGER ...
6259 *				ALTER EVENT TRIGGER ...
6260 *
6261 *****************************************************************************/
6262
6263CreateEventTrigStmt:
6264			CREATE EVENT TRIGGER name ON ColLabel
6265			EXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' ')'
6266				{
6267					CreateEventTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateEventTrigStmt);
6268
6269					n->trigname = $4;
6270					n->eventname = $6;
6271					n->whenclause = NULL;
6272					n->funcname = $9;
6273					$$ = (Node *) n;
6274				}
6275		  | CREATE EVENT TRIGGER name ON ColLabel
6276			WHEN event_trigger_when_list
6277			EXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' ')'
6278				{
6279					CreateEventTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateEventTrigStmt);
6280
6281					n->trigname = $4;
6282					n->eventname = $6;
6283					n->whenclause = $8;
6284					n->funcname = $11;
6285					$$ = (Node *) n;
6286				}
6287		;
6288
6289event_trigger_when_list:
6290		  event_trigger_when_item
6291			{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
6292		| event_trigger_when_list AND event_trigger_when_item
6293			{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
6294		;
6295
6296event_trigger_when_item:
6297		ColId IN_P '(' event_trigger_value_list ')'
6298			{ $$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $4, @1); }
6299		;
6300
6301event_trigger_value_list:
6302		  SCONST
6303			{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }
6304		| event_trigger_value_list ',' SCONST
6305			{ $$ = lappend($1, makeString($3)); }
6306		;
6307
6308AlterEventTrigStmt:
6309			ALTER EVENT TRIGGER name enable_trigger
6310				{
6311					AlterEventTrigStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEventTrigStmt);
6312
6313					n->trigname = $4;
6314					n->tgenabled = $5;
6315					$$ = (Node *) n;
6316				}
6317		;
6318
6319enable_trigger:
6320			ENABLE_P					{ $$ = TRIGGER_FIRES_ON_ORIGIN; }
6321			| ENABLE_P REPLICA			{ $$ = TRIGGER_FIRES_ON_REPLICA; }
6322			| ENABLE_P ALWAYS			{ $$ = TRIGGER_FIRES_ALWAYS; }
6323			| DISABLE_P					{ $$ = TRIGGER_DISABLED; }
6324		;
6325
6326/*****************************************************************************
6327 *
6328 *		QUERY :
6329 *				CREATE ASSERTION ...
6330 *
6331 *****************************************************************************/
6332
6333CreateAssertionStmt:
6334			CREATE ASSERTION any_name CHECK '(' a_expr ')' ConstraintAttributeSpec
6335				{
6336					ereport(ERROR,
6337							(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
6338							 errmsg("CREATE ASSERTION is not yet implemented"),
6339							 parser_errposition(@1)));
6340
6341					$$ = NULL;
6342				}
6343		;
6344
6345
6346/*****************************************************************************
6347 *
6348 *		QUERY :
6349 *				define (aggregate,operator,type)
6350 *
6351 *****************************************************************************/
6352
6353DefineStmt:
6354			CREATE opt_or_replace AGGREGATE func_name aggr_args definition
6355				{
6356					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6357
6358					n->kind = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;
6359					n->oldstyle = false;
6360					n->replace = $2;
6361					n->defnames = $4;
6362					n->args = $5;
6363					n->definition = $6;
6364					$$ = (Node *) n;
6365				}
6366			| CREATE opt_or_replace AGGREGATE func_name old_aggr_definition
6367				{
6368					/* old-style (pre-8.2) syntax for CREATE AGGREGATE */
6369					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6370
6371					n->kind = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;
6372					n->oldstyle = true;
6373					n->replace = $2;
6374					n->defnames = $4;
6375					n->args = NIL;
6376					n->definition = $5;
6377					$$ = (Node *) n;
6378				}
6379			| CREATE OPERATOR any_operator definition
6380				{
6381					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6382
6383					n->kind = OBJECT_OPERATOR;
6384					n->oldstyle = false;
6385					n->defnames = $3;
6386					n->args = NIL;
6387					n->definition = $4;
6388					$$ = (Node *) n;
6389				}
6390			| CREATE TYPE_P any_name definition
6391				{
6392					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6393
6394					n->kind = OBJECT_TYPE;
6395					n->oldstyle = false;
6396					n->defnames = $3;
6397					n->args = NIL;
6398					n->definition = $4;
6399					$$ = (Node *) n;
6400				}
6401			| CREATE TYPE_P any_name
6402				{
6403					/* Shell type (identified by lack of definition) */
6404					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6405
6406					n->kind = OBJECT_TYPE;
6407					n->oldstyle = false;
6408					n->defnames = $3;
6409					n->args = NIL;
6410					n->definition = NIL;
6411					$$ = (Node *) n;
6412				}
6413			| CREATE TYPE_P any_name AS '(' OptTableFuncElementList ')'
6414				{
6415					CompositeTypeStmt *n = makeNode(CompositeTypeStmt);
6416
6417					/* can't use qualified_name, sigh */
6418					n->typevar = makeRangeVarFromAnyName($3, @3, yyscanner);
6419					n->coldeflist = $6;
6420					$$ = (Node *) n;
6421				}
6422			| CREATE TYPE_P any_name AS ENUM_P '(' opt_enum_val_list ')'
6423				{
6424					CreateEnumStmt *n = makeNode(CreateEnumStmt);
6425
6426					n->typeName = $3;
6427					n->vals = $7;
6428					$$ = (Node *) n;
6429				}
6430			| CREATE TYPE_P any_name AS RANGE definition
6431				{
6432					CreateRangeStmt *n = makeNode(CreateRangeStmt);
6433
6434					n->typeName = $3;
6435					n->params = $6;
6436					$$ = (Node *) n;
6437				}
6438			| CREATE TEXT_P SEARCH PARSER any_name definition
6439				{
6440					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6441
6442					n->kind = OBJECT_TSPARSER;
6443					n->args = NIL;
6444					n->defnames = $5;
6445					n->definition = $6;
6446					$$ = (Node *) n;
6447				}
6448			| CREATE TEXT_P SEARCH DICTIONARY any_name definition
6449				{
6450					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6451
6452					n->kind = OBJECT_TSDICTIONARY;
6453					n->args = NIL;
6454					n->defnames = $5;
6455					n->definition = $6;
6456					$$ = (Node *) n;
6457				}
6458			| CREATE TEXT_P SEARCH TEMPLATE any_name definition
6459				{
6460					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6461
6462					n->kind = OBJECT_TSTEMPLATE;
6463					n->args = NIL;
6464					n->defnames = $5;
6465					n->definition = $6;
6466					$$ = (Node *) n;
6467				}
6468			| CREATE TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION any_name definition
6469				{
6470					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6471
6472					n->kind = OBJECT_TSCONFIGURATION;
6473					n->args = NIL;
6474					n->defnames = $5;
6475					n->definition = $6;
6476					$$ = (Node *) n;
6477				}
6478			| CREATE COLLATION any_name definition
6479				{
6480					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6481
6482					n->kind = OBJECT_COLLATION;
6483					n->args = NIL;
6484					n->defnames = $3;
6485					n->definition = $4;
6486					$$ = (Node *) n;
6487				}
6488			| CREATE COLLATION IF_P NOT EXISTS any_name definition
6489				{
6490					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6491
6492					n->kind = OBJECT_COLLATION;
6493					n->args = NIL;
6494					n->defnames = $6;
6495					n->definition = $7;
6496					n->if_not_exists = true;
6497					$$ = (Node *) n;
6498				}
6499			| CREATE COLLATION any_name FROM any_name
6500				{
6501					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6502
6503					n->kind = OBJECT_COLLATION;
6504					n->args = NIL;
6505					n->defnames = $3;
6506					n->definition = list_make1(makeDefElem("from", (Node *) $5, @5));
6507					$$ = (Node *) n;
6508				}
6509			| CREATE COLLATION IF_P NOT EXISTS any_name FROM any_name
6510				{
6511					DefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);
6512
6513					n->kind = OBJECT_COLLATION;
6514					n->args = NIL;
6515					n->defnames = $6;
6516					n->definition = list_make1(makeDefElem("from", (Node *) $8, @8));
6517					n->if_not_exists = true;
6518					$$ = (Node *) n;
6519				}
6520		;
6521
6522definition: '(' def_list ')'						{ $$ = $2; }
6523		;
6524
6525def_list:	def_elem								{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
6526			| def_list ',' def_elem					{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
6527		;
6528
6529def_elem:	ColLabel '=' def_arg
6530				{
6531					$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $3, @1);
6532				}
6533			| ColLabel
6534				{
6535					$$ = makeDefElem($1, NULL, @1);
6536				}
6537		;
6538
6539/* Note: any simple identifier will be returned as a type name! */
6540def_arg:	func_type						{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }
6541			| reserved_keyword				{ $$ = (Node *) makeString(pstrdup($1)); }
6542			| qual_all_Op					{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }
6543			| NumericOnly					{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }
6544			| Sconst						{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }
6545			| NONE							{ $$ = (Node *) makeString(pstrdup($1)); }
6546		;
6547
6548old_aggr_definition: '(' old_aggr_list ')'			{ $$ = $2; }
6549		;
6550
6551old_aggr_list: old_aggr_elem						{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
6552			| old_aggr_list ',' old_aggr_elem		{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
6553		;
6554
6555/*
6556 * Must use IDENT here to avoid reduce/reduce conflicts; fortunately none of
6557 * the item names needed in old aggregate definitions are likely to become
6558 * SQL keywords.
6559 */
6560old_aggr_elem:  IDENT '=' def_arg
6561				{
6562					$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $3, @1);
6563				}
6564		;
6565
6566opt_enum_val_list:
6567		enum_val_list							{ $$ = $1; }
6568		| /*EMPTY*/								{ $$ = NIL; }
6569		;
6570
6571enum_val_list:	Sconst
6572				{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }
6573			| enum_val_list ',' Sconst
6574				{ $$ = lappend($1, makeString($3)); }
6575		;
6576
6577/*****************************************************************************
6578 *
6579 *	ALTER TYPE enumtype ADD ...
6580 *
6581 *****************************************************************************/
6582
6583AlterEnumStmt:
6584		ALTER TYPE_P any_name ADD_P VALUE_P opt_if_not_exists Sconst
6585			{
6586				AlterEnumStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEnumStmt);
6587
6588				n->typeName = $3;
6589				n->oldVal = NULL;
6590				n->newVal = $7;
6591				n->newValNeighbor = NULL;
6592				n->newValIsAfter = true;
6593				n->skipIfNewValExists = $6;
6594				$$ = (Node *) n;
6595			}
6596		 | ALTER TYPE_P any_name ADD_P VALUE_P opt_if_not_exists Sconst BEFORE Sconst
6597			{
6598				AlterEnumStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEnumStmt);
6599
6600				n->typeName = $3;
6601				n->oldVal = NULL;
6602				n->newVal = $7;
6603				n->newValNeighbor = $9;
6604				n->newValIsAfter = false;
6605				n->skipIfNewValExists = $6;
6606				$$ = (Node *) n;
6607			}
6608		 | ALTER TYPE_P any_name ADD_P VALUE_P opt_if_not_exists Sconst AFTER Sconst
6609			{
6610				AlterEnumStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEnumStmt);
6611
6612				n->typeName = $3;
6613				n->oldVal = NULL;
6614				n->newVal = $7;
6615				n->newValNeighbor = $9;
6616				n->newValIsAfter = true;
6617				n->skipIfNewValExists = $6;
6618				$$ = (Node *) n;
6619			}
6620		 | ALTER TYPE_P any_name RENAME VALUE_P Sconst TO Sconst
6621			{
6622				AlterEnumStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEnumStmt);
6623
6624				n->typeName = $3;
6625				n->oldVal = $6;
6626				n->newVal = $8;
6627				n->newValNeighbor = NULL;
6628				n->newValIsAfter = false;
6629				n->skipIfNewValExists = false;
6630				$$ = (Node *) n;
6631			}
6632		 | ALTER TYPE_P any_name DROP VALUE_P Sconst
6633			{
6634				/*
6635				 * The following problems must be solved before this can be
6636				 * implemented:
6637				 *
6638				 * - There must be no instance of the target value in
6639				 *   any table.
6640				 *
6641				 * - The value must not appear in any catalog metadata,
6642				 *   such as stored view expressions or column defaults.
6643				 *
6644				 * - The value must not appear in any non-leaf page of a
6645				 *   btree (and similar issues with other index types).
6646				 *   This is problematic because a value could persist
6647				 *   there long after it's gone from user-visible data.
6648				 *
6649				 * - Concurrent sessions must not be able to insert the
6650				 *   value while the preceding conditions are being checked.
6651				 *
6652				 * - Possibly more...
6653				 */
6654				ereport(ERROR,
6655						(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
6656						 errmsg("dropping an enum value is not implemented"),
6657						 parser_errposition(@4)));
6658			}
6659		 ;
6660
6661opt_if_not_exists: IF_P NOT EXISTS              { $$ = true; }
6662		| /* EMPTY */                          { $$ = false; }
6663		;
6664
6665
6666/*****************************************************************************
6667 *
6668 *		QUERIES :
6669 *				CREATE OPERATOR CLASS ...
6670 *				CREATE OPERATOR FAMILY ...
6671 *				ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY ...
6672 *				DROP OPERATOR CLASS ...
6673 *				DROP OPERATOR FAMILY ...
6674 *
6675 *****************************************************************************/
6676
6677CreateOpClassStmt:
6678			CREATE OPERATOR CLASS any_name opt_default FOR TYPE_P Typename
6679			USING name opt_opfamily AS opclass_item_list
6680				{
6681					CreateOpClassStmt *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassStmt);
6682
6683					n->opclassname = $4;
6684					n->isDefault = $5;
6685					n->datatype = $8;
6686					n->amname = $10;
6687					n->opfamilyname = $11;
6688					n->items = $13;
6689					$$ = (Node *) n;
6690				}
6691		;
6692
6693opclass_item_list:
6694			opclass_item							{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
6695			| opclass_item_list ',' opclass_item	{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
6696		;
6697
6698opclass_item:
6699			OPERATOR Iconst any_operator opclass_purpose
6700				{
6701					CreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);
6702					ObjectWithArgs *owa = makeNode(ObjectWithArgs);
6703
6704					owa->objname = $3;
6705					owa->objargs = NIL;
6706					n->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_OPERATOR;
6707					n->name = owa;
6708					n->number = $2;
6709					n->order_family = $4;
6710					$$ = (Node *) n;
6711				}
6712			| OPERATOR Iconst operator_with_argtypes opclass_purpose
6713				{
6714					CreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);
6715
6716					n->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_OPERATOR;
6717					n->name = $3;
6718					n->number = $2;
6719					n->order_family = $4;
6720					$$ = (Node *) n;
6721				}
6722			| FUNCTION Iconst function_with_argtypes
6723				{
6724					CreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);
6725
6726					n->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_FUNCTION;
6727					n->name = $3;
6728					n->number = $2;
6729					$$ = (Node *) n;
6730				}
6731			| FUNCTION Iconst '(' type_list ')' function_with_argtypes
6732				{
6733					CreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);
6734
6735					n->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_FUNCTION;
6736					n->name = $6;
6737					n->number = $2;
6738					n->class_args = $4;
6739					$$ = (Node *) n;
6740				}
6741			| STORAGE Typename
6742				{
6743					CreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);
6744
6745					n->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_STORAGETYPE;
6746					n->storedtype = $2;
6747					$$ = (Node *) n;
6748				}
6749		;
6750
6751opt_default:	DEFAULT						{ $$ = true; }
6752			| /*EMPTY*/						{ $$ = false; }
6753		;
6754
6755opt_opfamily:	FAMILY any_name				{ $$ = $2; }
6756			| /*EMPTY*/						{ $$ = NIL; }
6757		;
6758
6759opclass_purpose: FOR SEARCH					{ $$ = NIL; }
6760			| FOR ORDER BY any_name			{ $$ = $4; }
6761			| /*EMPTY*/						{ $$ = NIL; }
6762		;
6763
6764
6765CreateOpFamilyStmt:
6766			CREATE OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name
6767				{
6768					CreateOpFamilyStmt *n = makeNode(CreateOpFamilyStmt);
6769
6770					n->opfamilyname = $4;
6771					n->amname = $6;
6772					$$ = (Node *) n;
6773				}
6774		;
6775
6776AlterOpFamilyStmt:
6777			ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name ADD_P opclass_item_list
6778				{
6779					AlterOpFamilyStmt *n = makeNode(AlterOpFamilyStmt);
6780
6781					n->opfamilyname = $4;
6782					n->amname = $6;
6783					n->isDrop = false;
6784					n->items = $8;
6785					$$ = (Node *) n;
6786				}
6787			| ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name DROP opclass_drop_list
6788				{
6789					AlterOpFamilyStmt *n = makeNode(AlterOpFamilyStmt);
6790
6791					n->opfamilyname = $4;
6792					n->amname = $6;
6793					n->isDrop = true;
6794					n->items = $8;
6795					$$ = (Node *) n;
6796				}
6797		;
6798
6799opclass_drop_list:
6800			opclass_drop							{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
6801			| opclass_drop_list ',' opclass_drop	{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
6802		;
6803
6804opclass_drop:
6805			OPERATOR Iconst '(' type_list ')'
6806				{
6807					CreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);
6808
6809					n->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_OPERATOR;
6810					n->number = $2;
6811					n->class_args = $4;
6812					$$ = (Node *) n;
6813				}
6814			| FUNCTION Iconst '(' type_list ')'
6815				{
6816					CreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);
6817
6818					n->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_FUNCTION;
6819					n->number = $2;
6820					n->class_args = $4;
6821					$$ = (Node *) n;
6822				}
6823		;
6824
6825
6826DropOpClassStmt:
6827			DROP OPERATOR CLASS any_name USING name opt_drop_behavior
6828				{
6829					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6830
6831					n->objects = list_make1(lcons(makeString($6), $4));
6832					n->removeType = OBJECT_OPCLASS;
6833					n->behavior = $7;
6834					n->missing_ok = false;
6835					n->concurrent = false;
6836					$$ = (Node *) n;
6837				}
6838			| DROP OPERATOR CLASS IF_P EXISTS any_name USING name opt_drop_behavior
6839				{
6840					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6841
6842					n->objects = list_make1(lcons(makeString($8), $6));
6843					n->removeType = OBJECT_OPCLASS;
6844					n->behavior = $9;
6845					n->missing_ok = true;
6846					n->concurrent = false;
6847					$$ = (Node *) n;
6848				}
6849		;
6850
6851DropOpFamilyStmt:
6852			DROP OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name opt_drop_behavior
6853				{
6854					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6855
6856					n->objects = list_make1(lcons(makeString($6), $4));
6857					n->removeType = OBJECT_OPFAMILY;
6858					n->behavior = $7;
6859					n->missing_ok = false;
6860					n->concurrent = false;
6861					$$ = (Node *) n;
6862				}
6863			| DROP OPERATOR FAMILY IF_P EXISTS any_name USING name opt_drop_behavior
6864				{
6865					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6866
6867					n->objects = list_make1(lcons(makeString($8), $6));
6868					n->removeType = OBJECT_OPFAMILY;
6869					n->behavior = $9;
6870					n->missing_ok = true;
6871					n->concurrent = false;
6872					$$ = (Node *) n;
6873				}
6874		;
6875
6876
6877/*****************************************************************************
6878 *
6879 *		QUERY:
6880 *
6881 *		DROP OWNED BY username [, username ...] [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]
6882 *		REASSIGN OWNED BY username [, username ...] TO username
6883 *
6884 *****************************************************************************/
6885DropOwnedStmt:
6886			DROP OWNED BY role_list opt_drop_behavior
6887				{
6888					DropOwnedStmt *n = makeNode(DropOwnedStmt);
6889
6890					n->roles = $4;
6891					n->behavior = $5;
6892					$$ = (Node *) n;
6893				}
6894		;
6895
6896ReassignOwnedStmt:
6897			REASSIGN OWNED BY role_list TO RoleSpec
6898				{
6899					ReassignOwnedStmt *n = makeNode(ReassignOwnedStmt);
6900
6901					n->roles = $4;
6902					n->newrole = $6;
6903					$$ = (Node *) n;
6904				}
6905		;
6906
6907/*****************************************************************************
6908 *
6909 *		QUERY:
6910 *
6911 *		DROP itemtype [ IF EXISTS ] itemname [, itemname ...]
6912 *           [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]
6913 *
6914 *****************************************************************************/
6915
6916DropStmt:	DROP object_type_any_name IF_P EXISTS any_name_list opt_drop_behavior
6917				{
6918					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6919
6920					n->removeType = $2;
6921					n->missing_ok = true;
6922					n->objects = $5;
6923					n->behavior = $6;
6924					n->concurrent = false;
6925					$$ = (Node *) n;
6926				}
6927			| DROP object_type_any_name any_name_list opt_drop_behavior
6928				{
6929					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6930
6931					n->removeType = $2;
6932					n->missing_ok = false;
6933					n->objects = $3;
6934					n->behavior = $4;
6935					n->concurrent = false;
6936					$$ = (Node *) n;
6937				}
6938			| DROP drop_type_name IF_P EXISTS name_list opt_drop_behavior
6939				{
6940					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6941
6942					n->removeType = $2;
6943					n->missing_ok = true;
6944					n->objects = $5;
6945					n->behavior = $6;
6946					n->concurrent = false;
6947					$$ = (Node *) n;
6948				}
6949			| DROP drop_type_name name_list opt_drop_behavior
6950				{
6951					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6952
6953					n->removeType = $2;
6954					n->missing_ok = false;
6955					n->objects = $3;
6956					n->behavior = $4;
6957					n->concurrent = false;
6958					$$ = (Node *) n;
6959				}
6960			| DROP object_type_name_on_any_name name ON any_name opt_drop_behavior
6961				{
6962					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6963
6964					n->removeType = $2;
6965					n->objects = list_make1(lappend($5, makeString($3)));
6966					n->behavior = $6;
6967					n->missing_ok = false;
6968					n->concurrent = false;
6969					$$ = (Node *) n;
6970				}
6971			| DROP object_type_name_on_any_name IF_P EXISTS name ON any_name opt_drop_behavior
6972				{
6973					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6974
6975					n->removeType = $2;
6976					n->objects = list_make1(lappend($7, makeString($5)));
6977					n->behavior = $8;
6978					n->missing_ok = true;
6979					n->concurrent = false;
6980					$$ = (Node *) n;
6981				}
6982			| DROP TYPE_P type_name_list opt_drop_behavior
6983				{
6984					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6985
6986					n->removeType = OBJECT_TYPE;
6987					n->missing_ok = false;
6988					n->objects = $3;
6989					n->behavior = $4;
6990					n->concurrent = false;
6991					$$ = (Node *) n;
6992				}
6993			| DROP TYPE_P IF_P EXISTS type_name_list opt_drop_behavior
6994				{
6995					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
6996
6997					n->removeType = OBJECT_TYPE;
6998					n->missing_ok = true;
6999					n->objects = $5;
7000					n->behavior = $6;
7001					n->concurrent = false;
7002					$$ = (Node *) n;
7003				}
7004			| DROP DOMAIN_P type_name_list opt_drop_behavior
7005				{
7006					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
7007
7008					n->removeType = OBJECT_DOMAIN;
7009					n->missing_ok = false;
7010					n->objects = $3;
7011					n->behavior = $4;
7012					n->concurrent = false;
7013					$$ = (Node *) n;
7014				}
7015			| DROP DOMAIN_P IF_P EXISTS type_name_list opt_drop_behavior
7016				{
7017					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
7018
7019					n->removeType = OBJECT_DOMAIN;
7020					n->missing_ok = true;
7021					n->objects = $5;
7022					n->behavior = $6;
7023					n->concurrent = false;
7024					$$ = (Node *) n;
7025				}
7026			| DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY any_name_list opt_drop_behavior
7027				{
7028					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
7029
7030					n->removeType = OBJECT_INDEX;
7031					n->missing_ok = false;
7032					n->objects = $4;
7033					n->behavior = $5;
7034					n->concurrent = true;
7035					$$ = (Node *) n;
7036				}
7037			| DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF_P EXISTS any_name_list opt_drop_behavior
7038				{
7039					DropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);
7040
7041					n->removeType = OBJECT_INDEX;
7042					n->missing_ok = true;
7043					n->objects = $6;
7044					n->behavior = $7;
7045					n->concurrent = true;
7046					$$ = (Node *) n;
7047				}
7048		;
7049
7050/* object types taking any_name/any_name_list */
7051object_type_any_name:
7052			TABLE									{ $$ = OBJECT_TABLE; }
7053			| SEQUENCE								{ $$ = OBJECT_SEQUENCE; }
7054			| VIEW									{ $$ = OBJECT_VIEW; }
7055			| MATERIALIZED VIEW						{ $$ = OBJECT_MATVIEW; }
7056			| INDEX									{ $$ = OBJECT_INDEX; }
7057			| FOREIGN TABLE							{ $$ = OBJECT_FOREIGN_TABLE; }
7058			| COLLATION								{ $$ = OBJECT_COLLATION; }
7059			| CONVERSION_P							{ $$ = OBJECT_CONVERSION; }
7060			| STATISTICS							{ $$ = OBJECT_STATISTIC_EXT; }
7061			| TEXT_P SEARCH PARSER					{ $$ = OBJECT_TSPARSER; }
7062			| TEXT_P SEARCH DICTIONARY				{ $$ = OBJECT_TSDICTIONARY; }
7063			| TEXT_P SEARCH TEMPLATE				{ $$ = OBJECT_TSTEMPLATE; }
7064			| TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION			{ $$ = OBJECT_TSCONFIGURATION; }
7065		;
7066
7067/*
7068 * object types taking name/name_list
7069 *
7070 * DROP handles some of them separately
7071 */
7072
7073object_type_name:
7074			drop_type_name							{ $$ = $1; }
7075			| DATABASE								{ $$ = OBJECT_DATABASE; }
7076			| ROLE									{ $$ = OBJECT_ROLE; }
7077			| SUBSCRIPTION							{ $$ = OBJECT_SUBSCRIPTION; }
7078			| TABLESPACE							{ $$ = OBJECT_TABLESPACE; }
7079		;
7080
7081drop_type_name:
7082			ACCESS METHOD							{ $$ = OBJECT_ACCESS_METHOD; }
7083			| EVENT TRIGGER							{ $$ = OBJECT_EVENT_TRIGGER; }
7084			| EXTENSION								{ $$ = OBJECT_EXTENSION; }
7085			| FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER				{ $$ = OBJECT_FDW; }
7086			| opt_procedural LANGUAGE				{ $$ = OBJECT_LANGUAGE; }
7087			| PUBLICATION							{ $$ = OBJECT_PUBLICATION; }
7088			| SCHEMA								{ $$ = OBJECT_SCHEMA; }
7089			| SERVER								{ $$ = OBJECT_FOREIGN_SERVER; }
7090		;
7091
7092/* object types attached to a table */
7093object_type_name_on_any_name:
7094			POLICY									{ $$ = OBJECT_POLICY; }
7095			| RULE									{ $$ = OBJECT_RULE; }
7096			| TRIGGER								{ $$ = OBJECT_TRIGGER; }
7097		;
7098
7099any_name_list:
7100			any_name								{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
7101			| any_name_list ',' any_name			{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
7102		;
7103
7104any_name:	ColId						{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }
7105			| ColId attrs				{ $$ = lcons(makeString($1), $2); }
7106		;
7107
7108attrs:		'.' attr_name
7109					{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($2)); }
7110			| attrs '.' attr_name
7111					{ $$ = lappend($1, makeString($3)); }
7112		;
7113
7114type_name_list:
7115			Typename								{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
7116			| type_name_list ',' Typename			{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
7117		;
7118
7119/*****************************************************************************
7120 *
7121 *		QUERY:
7122 *				truncate table relname1, relname2, ...
7123 *
7124 *****************************************************************************/
7125
7126TruncateStmt:
7127			TRUNCATE opt_table relation_expr_list opt_restart_seqs opt_drop_behavior
7128				{
7129					TruncateStmt *n = makeNode(TruncateStmt);
7130
7131					n->relations = $3;
7132					n->restart_seqs = $4;
7133					n->behavior = $5;
7134					$$ = (Node *) n;
7135				}
7136		;
7137
7138opt_restart_seqs:
7139			CONTINUE_P IDENTITY_P		{ $$ = false; }
7140			| RESTART IDENTITY_P		{ $$ = true; }
7141			| /* EMPTY */				{ $$ = false; }
7142		;
7143
7144/*****************************************************************************
7145 *
7146 * COMMENT ON <object> IS <text>
7147 *
7148 *****************************************************************************/
7149
7150CommentStmt:
7151			COMMENT ON object_type_any_name any_name IS comment_text
7152				{
7153					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7154
7155					n->objtype = $3;
7156					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7157					n->comment = $6;
7158					$$ = (Node *) n;
7159				}
7160			| COMMENT ON COLUMN any_name IS comment_text
7161				{
7162					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7163
7164					n->objtype = OBJECT_COLUMN;
7165					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7166					n->comment = $6;
7167					$$ = (Node *) n;
7168				}
7169			| COMMENT ON object_type_name name IS comment_text
7170				{
7171					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7172
7173					n->objtype = $3;
7174					n->object = (Node *) makeString($4);
7175					n->comment = $6;
7176					$$ = (Node *) n;
7177				}
7178			| COMMENT ON TYPE_P Typename IS comment_text
7179				{
7180					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7181
7182					n->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;
7183					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7184					n->comment = $6;
7185					$$ = (Node *) n;
7186				}
7187			| COMMENT ON DOMAIN_P Typename IS comment_text
7188				{
7189					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7190
7191					n->objtype = OBJECT_DOMAIN;
7192					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7193					n->comment = $6;
7194					$$ = (Node *) n;
7195				}
7196			| COMMENT ON AGGREGATE aggregate_with_argtypes IS comment_text
7197				{
7198					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7199
7200					n->objtype = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;
7201					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7202					n->comment = $6;
7203					$$ = (Node *) n;
7204				}
7205			| COMMENT ON FUNCTION function_with_argtypes IS comment_text
7206				{
7207					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7208
7209					n->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;
7210					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7211					n->comment = $6;
7212					$$ = (Node *) n;
7213				}
7214			| COMMENT ON OPERATOR operator_with_argtypes IS comment_text
7215				{
7216					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7217
7218					n->objtype = OBJECT_OPERATOR;
7219					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7220					n->comment = $6;
7221					$$ = (Node *) n;
7222				}
7223			| COMMENT ON CONSTRAINT name ON any_name IS comment_text
7224				{
7225					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7226
7227					n->objtype = OBJECT_TABCONSTRAINT;
7228					n->object = (Node *) lappend($6, makeString($4));
7229					n->comment = $8;
7230					$$ = (Node *) n;
7231				}
7232			| COMMENT ON CONSTRAINT name ON DOMAIN_P any_name IS comment_text
7233				{
7234					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7235
7236					n->objtype = OBJECT_DOMCONSTRAINT;
7237					/*
7238					 * should use Typename not any_name in the production, but
7239					 * there's a shift/reduce conflict if we do that, so fix it
7240					 * up here.
7241					 */
7242					n->object = (Node *) list_make2(makeTypeNameFromNameList($7), makeString($4));
7243					n->comment = $9;
7244					$$ = (Node *) n;
7245				}
7246			| COMMENT ON object_type_name_on_any_name name ON any_name IS comment_text
7247				{
7248					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7249
7250					n->objtype = $3;
7251					n->object = (Node *) lappend($6, makeString($4));
7252					n->comment = $8;
7253					$$ = (Node *) n;
7254				}
7255			| COMMENT ON PROCEDURE function_with_argtypes IS comment_text
7256				{
7257					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7258
7259					n->objtype = OBJECT_PROCEDURE;
7260					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7261					n->comment = $6;
7262					$$ = (Node *) n;
7263				}
7264			| COMMENT ON ROUTINE function_with_argtypes IS comment_text
7265				{
7266					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7267
7268					n->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;
7269					n->object = (Node *) $4;
7270					n->comment = $6;
7271					$$ = (Node *) n;
7272				}
7273			| COMMENT ON TRANSFORM FOR Typename LANGUAGE name IS comment_text
7274				{
7275					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7276
7277					n->objtype = OBJECT_TRANSFORM;
7278					n->object = (Node *) list_make2($5, makeString($7));
7279					n->comment = $9;
7280					$$ = (Node *) n;
7281				}
7282			| COMMENT ON OPERATOR CLASS any_name USING name IS comment_text
7283				{
7284					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7285
7286					n->objtype = OBJECT_OPCLASS;
7287					n->object = (Node *) lcons(makeString($7), $5);
7288					n->comment = $9;
7289					$$ = (Node *) n;
7290				}
7291			| COMMENT ON OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name IS comment_text
7292				{
7293					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7294
7295					n->objtype = OBJECT_OPFAMILY;
7296					n->object = (Node *) lcons(makeString($7), $5);
7297					n->comment = $9;
7298					$$ = (Node *) n;
7299				}
7300			| COMMENT ON LARGE_P OBJECT_P NumericOnly IS comment_text
7301				{
7302					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7303
7304					n->objtype = OBJECT_LARGEOBJECT;
7305					n->object = (Node *) $5;
7306					n->comment = $7;
7307					$$ = (Node *) n;
7308				}
7309			| COMMENT ON CAST '(' Typename AS Typename ')' IS comment_text
7310				{
7311					CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
7312
7313					n->objtype = OBJECT_CAST;
7314					n->object = (Node *) list_make2($5, $7);
7315					n->comment = $10;
7316					$$ = (Node *) n;
7317				}
7318		;
7319
7320comment_text:
7321			Sconst								{ $$ = $1; }
7322			| NULL_P							{ $$ = NULL; }
7323		;
7324
7325
7326/*****************************************************************************
7327 *
7328 *  SECURITY LABEL [FOR <provider>] ON <object> IS <label>
7329 *
7330 *  As with COMMENT ON, <object> can refer to various types of database
7331 *  objects (e.g. TABLE, COLUMN, etc.).
7332 *
7333 *****************************************************************************/
7334
7335SecLabelStmt:
7336			SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON object_type_any_name any_name
7337			IS security_label
7338				{
7339					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7340
7341					n->provider = $3;
7342					n->objtype = $5;
7343					n->object = (Node *) $6;
7344					n->label = $8;
7345					$$ = (Node *) n;
7346				}
7347			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON COLUMN any_name
7348			  IS security_label
7349				{
7350					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7351
7352					n->provider = $3;
7353					n->objtype = OBJECT_COLUMN;
7354					n->object = (Node *) $6;
7355					n->label = $8;
7356					$$ = (Node *) n;
7357				}
7358			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON object_type_name name
7359			  IS security_label
7360				{
7361					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7362
7363					n->provider = $3;
7364					n->objtype = $5;
7365					n->object = (Node *) makeString($6);
7366					n->label = $8;
7367					$$ = (Node *) n;
7368				}
7369			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON TYPE_P Typename
7370			  IS security_label
7371				{
7372					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7373
7374					n->provider = $3;
7375					n->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;
7376					n->object = (Node *) $6;
7377					n->label = $8;
7378					$$ = (Node *) n;
7379				}
7380			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON DOMAIN_P Typename
7381			  IS security_label
7382				{
7383					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7384
7385					n->provider = $3;
7386					n->objtype = OBJECT_DOMAIN;
7387					n->object = (Node *) $6;
7388					n->label = $8;
7389					$$ = (Node *) n;
7390				}
7391			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON AGGREGATE aggregate_with_argtypes
7392			  IS security_label
7393				{
7394					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7395
7396					n->provider = $3;
7397					n->objtype = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;
7398					n->object = (Node *) $6;
7399					n->label = $8;
7400					$$ = (Node *) n;
7401				}
7402			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON FUNCTION function_with_argtypes
7403			  IS security_label
7404				{
7405					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7406
7407					n->provider = $3;
7408					n->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;
7409					n->object = (Node *) $6;
7410					n->label = $8;
7411					$$ = (Node *) n;
7412				}
7413			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON LARGE_P OBJECT_P NumericOnly
7414			  IS security_label
7415				{
7416					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7417
7418					n->provider = $3;
7419					n->objtype = OBJECT_LARGEOBJECT;
7420					n->object = (Node *) $7;
7421					n->label = $9;
7422					$$ = (Node *) n;
7423				}
7424			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON PROCEDURE function_with_argtypes
7425			  IS security_label
7426				{
7427					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7428
7429					n->provider = $3;
7430					n->objtype = OBJECT_PROCEDURE;
7431					n->object = (Node *) $6;
7432					n->label = $8;
7433					$$ = (Node *) n;
7434				}
7435			| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON ROUTINE function_with_argtypes
7436			  IS security_label
7437				{
7438					SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
7439
7440					n->provider = $3;
7441					n->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;
7442					n->object = (Node *) $6;
7443					n->label = $8;
7444					$$ = (Node *) n;
7445				}
7446		;
7447
7448opt_provider:	FOR NonReservedWord_or_Sconst	{ $$ = $2; }
7449				| /* EMPTY */					{ $$ = NULL; }
7450		;
7451
7452security_label:	Sconst				{ $$ = $1; }
7453				| NULL_P			{ $$ = NULL; }
7454		;
7455
7456/*****************************************************************************
7457 *
7458 *		QUERY:
7459 *			fetch/move
7460 *
7461 *****************************************************************************/
7462
7463FetchStmt:	FETCH fetch_args
7464				{
7465					FetchStmt *n = (FetchStmt *) $2;
7466
7467					n->ismove = false;
7468					$$ = (Node *) n;
7469				}
7470			| MOVE fetch_args
7471				{
7472					FetchStmt *n = (FetchStmt *) $2;
7473
7474					n->ismove = true;
7475					$$ = (Node *) n;
7476				}
7477		;
7478
7479fetch_args:	cursor_name
7480				{
7481					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7482
7483					n->portalname = $1;
7484					n->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;
7485					n->howMany = 1;
7486					$$ = (Node *) n;
7487				}
7488			| from_in cursor_name
7489				{
7490					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7491
7492					n->portalname = $2;
7493					n->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;
7494					n->howMany = 1;
7495					$$ = (Node *) n;
7496				}
7497			| NEXT opt_from_in cursor_name
7498				{
7499					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7500
7501					n->portalname = $3;
7502					n->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;
7503					n->howMany = 1;
7504					$$ = (Node *) n;
7505				}
7506			| PRIOR opt_from_in cursor_name
7507				{
7508					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7509
7510					n->portalname = $3;
7511					n->direction = FETCH_BACKWARD;
7512					n->howMany = 1;
7513					$$ = (Node *) n;
7514				}
7515			| FIRST_P opt_from_in cursor_name
7516				{
7517					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7518
7519					n->portalname = $3;
7520					n->direction = FETCH_ABSOLUTE;
7521					n->howMany = 1;
7522					$$ = (Node *) n;
7523				}
7524			| LAST_P opt_from_in cursor_name
7525				{
7526					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7527
7528					n->portalname = $3;
7529					n->direction = FETCH_ABSOLUTE;
7530					n->howMany = -1;
7531					$$ = (Node *) n;
7532				}
7533			| ABSOLUTE_P SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name
7534				{
7535					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7536
7537					n->portalname = $4;
7538					n->direction = FETCH_ABSOLUTE;
7539					n->howMany = $2;
7540					$$ = (Node *) n;
7541				}
7542			| RELATIVE_P SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name
7543				{
7544					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7545
7546					n->portalname = $4;
7547					n->direction = FETCH_RELATIVE;
7548					n->howMany = $2;
7549					$$ = (Node *) n;
7550				}
7551			| SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name
7552				{
7553					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7554
7555					n->portalname = $3;
7556					n->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;
7557					n->howMany = $1;
7558					$$ = (Node *) n;
7559				}
7560			| ALL opt_from_in cursor_name
7561				{
7562					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7563
7564					n->portalname = $3;
7565					n->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;
7566					n->howMany = FETCH_ALL;
7567					$$ = (Node *) n;
7568				}
7569			| FORWARD opt_from_in cursor_name
7570				{
7571					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7572
7573					n->portalname = $3;
7574					n->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;
7575					n->howMany = 1;
7576					$$ = (Node *) n;
7577				}
7578			| FORWARD SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name
7579				{
7580					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7581
7582					n->portalname = $4;
7583					n->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;
7584					n->howMany = $2;
7585					$$ = (Node *) n;
7586				}
7587			| FORWARD ALL opt_from_in cursor_name
7588				{
7589					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7590
7591					n->portalname = $4;
7592					n->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;
7593					n->howMany = FETCH_ALL;
7594					$$ = (Node *) n;
7595				}
7596			| BACKWARD opt_from_in cursor_name
7597				{
7598					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7599
7600					n->portalname = $3;
7601					n->direction = FETCH_BACKWARD;
7602					n->howMany = 1;
7603					$$ = (Node *) n;
7604				}
7605			| BACKWARD SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name
7606				{
7607					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7608
7609					n->portalname = $4;
7610					n->direction = FETCH_BACKWARD;
7611					n->howMany = $2;
7612					$$ = (Node *) n;
7613				}
7614			| BACKWARD ALL opt_from_in cursor_name
7615				{
7616					FetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);
7617
7618					n->portalname = $4;
7619					n->direction = FETCH_BACKWARD;
7620					n->howMany = FETCH_ALL;
7621					$$ = (Node *) n;
7622				}
7623		;
7624
7625from_in:	FROM
7626			| IN_P
7627		;
7628
7629opt_from_in:	from_in
7630			| /* EMPTY */
7631		;
7632
7633
7634/*****************************************************************************
7635 *
7636 * GRANT and REVOKE statements
7637 *
7638 *****************************************************************************/
7639
7640GrantStmt:	GRANT privileges ON privilege_target TO grantee_list
7641			opt_grant_grant_option opt_granted_by
7642				{
7643					GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
7644
7645					n->is_grant = true;
7646					n->privileges = $2;
7647					n->targtype = ($4)->targtype;
7648					n->objtype = ($4)->objtype;
7649					n->objects = ($4)->objs;
7650					n->grantees = $6;
7651					n->grant_option = $7;
7652					n->grantor = $8;
7653					$$ = (Node *) n;
7654				}
7655		;
7656
7657RevokeStmt:
7658			REVOKE privileges ON privilege_target
7659			FROM grantee_list opt_granted_by opt_drop_behavior
7660				{
7661					GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
7662
7663					n->is_grant = false;
7664					n->grant_option = false;
7665					n->privileges = $2;
7666					n->targtype = ($4)->targtype;
7667					n->objtype = ($4)->objtype;
7668					n->objects = ($4)->objs;
7669					n->grantees = $6;
7670					n->grantor = $7;
7671					n->behavior = $8;
7672					$$ = (Node *) n;
7673				}
7674			| REVOKE GRANT OPTION FOR privileges ON privilege_target
7675			FROM grantee_list opt_granted_by opt_drop_behavior
7676				{
7677					GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
7678
7679					n->is_grant = false;
7680					n->grant_option = true;
7681					n->privileges = $5;
7682					n->targtype = ($7)->targtype;
7683					n->objtype = ($7)->objtype;
7684					n->objects = ($7)->objs;
7685					n->grantees = $9;
7686					n->grantor = $10;
7687					n->behavior = $11;
7688					$$ = (Node *) n;
7689				}
7690		;
7691
7692
7693/*
7694 * Privilege names are represented as strings; the validity of the privilege
7695 * names gets checked at execution.  This is a bit annoying but we have little
7696 * choice because of the syntactic conflict with lists of role names in
7697 * GRANT/REVOKE.  What's more, we have to call out in the "privilege"
7698 * production any reserved keywords that need to be usable as privilege names.
7699 */
7700
7701/* either ALL [PRIVILEGES] or a list of individual privileges */
7702privileges: privilege_list
7703				{ $$ = $1; }
7704			| ALL
7705				{ $$ = NIL; }
7706			| ALL PRIVILEGES
7707				{ $$ = NIL; }
7708			| ALL '(' columnList ')'
7709				{
7710					AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
7711
7712					n->priv_name = NULL;
7713					n->cols = $3;
7714					$$ = list_make1(n);
7715				}
7716			| ALL PRIVILEGES '(' columnList ')'
7717				{
7718					AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
7719
7720					n->priv_name = NULL;
7721					n->cols = $4;
7722					$$ = list_make1(n);
7723				}
7724		;
7725
7726privilege_list:	privilege							{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
7727			| privilege_list ',' privilege			{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
7728		;
7729
7730privilege:	SELECT opt_column_list
7731			{
7732				AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
7733
7734				n->priv_name = pstrdup($1);
7735				n->cols = $2;
7736				$$ = n;
7737			}
7738		| REFERENCES opt_column_list
7739			{
7740				AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
7741
7742				n->priv_name = pstrdup($1);
7743				n->cols = $2;
7744				$$ = n;
7745			}
7746		| CREATE opt_column_list
7747			{
7748				AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
7749
7750				n->priv_name = pstrdup($1);
7751				n->cols = $2;
7752				$$ = n;
7753			}
7754		| ALTER SYSTEM_P
7755			{
7756				AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
7757				n->priv_name = pstrdup("alter system");
7758				n->cols = NIL;
7759				$$ = n;
7760			}
7761		| ColId opt_column_list
7762			{
7763				AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
7764
7765				n->priv_name = $1;
7766				n->cols = $2;
7767				$$ = n;
7768			}
7769		;
7770
7771parameter_name_list:
7772		parameter_name
7773			{
7774				$$ = list_make1(makeString($1));
7775			}
7776		| parameter_name_list ',' parameter_name
7777			{
7778				$$ = lappend($1, makeString($3));
7779			}
7780		;
7781
7782parameter_name:
7783		ColId
7784			{
7785				$$ = $1;
7786			}
7787		| parameter_name '.' ColId
7788			{
7789				$$ = psprintf("%s.%s", $1, $3);
7790			}
7791		;
7792
7793
7794/* Don't bother trying to fold the first two rules into one using
7795 * opt_table.  You're going to get conflicts.
7796 */
7797privilege_target:
7798			qualified_name_list
7799				{
7800					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7801
7802					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7803					n->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;
7804					n->objs = $1;
7805					$$ = n;
7806				}
7807			| TABLE qualified_name_list
7808				{
7809					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7810
7811					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7812					n->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;
7813					n->objs = $2;
7814					$$ = n;
7815				}
7816			| SEQUENCE qualified_name_list
7817				{
7818					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7819
7820					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7821					n->objtype = OBJECT_SEQUENCE;
7822					n->objs = $2;
7823					$$ = n;
7824				}
7825			| FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name_list
7826				{
7827					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7828
7829					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7830					n->objtype = OBJECT_FDW;
7831					n->objs = $4;
7832					$$ = n;
7833				}
7834			| FOREIGN SERVER name_list
7835				{
7836					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7837
7838					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7839					n->objtype = OBJECT_FOREIGN_SERVER;
7840					n->objs = $3;
7841					$$ = n;
7842				}
7843			| FUNCTION function_with_argtypes_list
7844				{
7845					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7846
7847					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7848					n->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;
7849					n->objs = $2;
7850					$$ = n;
7851				}
7852			| PROCEDURE function_with_argtypes_list
7853				{
7854					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7855
7856					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7857					n->objtype = OBJECT_PROCEDURE;
7858					n->objs = $2;
7859					$$ = n;
7860				}
7861			| ROUTINE function_with_argtypes_list
7862				{
7863					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7864
7865					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7866					n->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;
7867					n->objs = $2;
7868					$$ = n;
7869				}
7870			| DATABASE name_list
7871				{
7872					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7873
7874					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7875					n->objtype = OBJECT_DATABASE;
7876					n->objs = $2;
7877					$$ = n;
7878				}
7879			| DOMAIN_P any_name_list
7880				{
7881					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7882
7883					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7884					n->objtype = OBJECT_DOMAIN;
7885					n->objs = $2;
7886					$$ = n;
7887				}
7888			| LANGUAGE name_list
7889				{
7890					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7891
7892					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7893					n->objtype = OBJECT_LANGUAGE;
7894					n->objs = $2;
7895					$$ = n;
7896				}
7897			| LARGE_P OBJECT_P NumericOnly_list
7898				{
7899					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7900
7901					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7902					n->objtype = OBJECT_LARGEOBJECT;
7903					n->objs = $3;
7904					$$ = n;
7905				}
7906			| PARAMETER parameter_name_list
7907				{
7908					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7909					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7910					n->objtype = OBJECT_PARAMETER_ACL;
7911					n->objs = $2;
7912					$$ = n;
7913				}
7914			| SCHEMA name_list
7915				{
7916					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7917
7918					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7919					n->objtype = OBJECT_SCHEMA;
7920					n->objs = $2;
7921					$$ = n;
7922				}
7923			| TABLESPACE name_list
7924				{
7925					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7926
7927					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7928					n->objtype = OBJECT_TABLESPACE;
7929					n->objs = $2;
7930					$$ = n;
7931				}
7932			| TYPE_P any_name_list
7933				{
7934					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7935
7936					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
7937					n->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;
7938					n->objs = $2;
7939					$$ = n;
7940				}
7941			| ALL TABLES IN_P SCHEMA name_list
7942				{
7943					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7944
7945					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_ALL_IN_SCHEMA;
7946					n->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;
7947					n->objs = $5;
7948					$$ = n;
7949				}
7950			| ALL SEQUENCES IN_P SCHEMA name_list
7951				{
7952					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7953
7954					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_ALL_IN_SCHEMA;
7955					n->objtype = OBJECT_SEQUENCE;
7956					n->objs = $5;
7957					$$ = n;
7958				}
7959			| ALL FUNCTIONS IN_P SCHEMA name_list
7960				{
7961					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7962
7963					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_ALL_IN_SCHEMA;
7964					n->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;
7965					n->objs = $5;
7966					$$ = n;
7967				}
7968			| ALL PROCEDURES IN_P SCHEMA name_list
7969				{
7970					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7971
7972					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_ALL_IN_SCHEMA;
7973					n->objtype = OBJECT_PROCEDURE;
7974					n->objs = $5;
7975					$$ = n;
7976				}
7977			| ALL ROUTINES IN_P SCHEMA name_list
7978				{
7979					PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
7980
7981					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_ALL_IN_SCHEMA;
7982					n->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;
7983					n->objs = $5;
7984					$$ = n;
7985				}
7986		;
7987
7988
7989grantee_list:
7990			grantee									{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
7991			| grantee_list ',' grantee				{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
7992		;
7993
7994grantee:
7995			RoleSpec								{ $$ = $1; }
7996			| GROUP_P RoleSpec						{ $$ = $2; }
7997		;
7998
7999
8000opt_grant_grant_option:
8001			WITH GRANT OPTION { $$ = true; }
8002			| /*EMPTY*/ { $$ = false; }
8003		;
8004
8005/*****************************************************************************
8006 *
8007 * GRANT and REVOKE ROLE statements
8008 *
8009 *****************************************************************************/
8010
8011GrantRoleStmt:
8012			GRANT privilege_list TO role_list opt_granted_by
8013				{
8014					GrantRoleStmt *n = makeNode(GrantRoleStmt);
8015
8016					n->is_grant = true;
8017					n->granted_roles = $2;
8018					n->grantee_roles = $4;
8019					n->opt = NIL;
8020					n->grantor = $5;
8021					$$ = (Node *) n;
8022				}
8023		  | GRANT privilege_list TO role_list WITH grant_role_opt_list opt_granted_by
8024				{
8025					GrantRoleStmt *n = makeNode(GrantRoleStmt);
8026
8027					n->is_grant = true;
8028					n->granted_roles = $2;
8029					n->grantee_roles = $4;
8030					n->opt = $6;
8031					n->grantor = $7;
8032					$$ = (Node *) n;
8033				}
8034		;
8035
8036RevokeRoleStmt:
8037			REVOKE privilege_list FROM role_list opt_granted_by opt_drop_behavior
8038				{
8039					GrantRoleStmt *n = makeNode(GrantRoleStmt);
8040
8041					n->is_grant = false;
8042					n->opt = NIL;
8043					n->granted_roles = $2;
8044					n->grantee_roles = $4;
8045					n->grantor = $5;
8046					n->behavior = $6;
8047					$$ = (Node *) n;
8048				}
8049			| REVOKE ColId OPTION FOR privilege_list FROM role_list opt_granted_by opt_drop_behavior
8050				{
8051					GrantRoleStmt *n = makeNode(GrantRoleStmt);
8052					DefElem *opt;
8053
8054					opt = makeDefElem(pstrdup($2),
8055									  (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @2);
8056					n->is_grant = false;
8057					n->opt = list_make1(opt);
8058					n->granted_roles = $5;
8059					n->grantee_roles = $7;
8060					n->grantor = $8;
8061					n->behavior = $9;
8062					$$ = (Node *) n;
8063				}
8064		;
8065
8066grant_role_opt_list:
8067			grant_role_opt_list ',' grant_role_opt	{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
8068			| grant_role_opt						{ $$ = list_make1($1); }
8069		;
8070
8071grant_role_opt:
8072		ColLabel grant_role_opt_value
8073			{
8074				$$ = makeDefElem(pstrdup($1), $2, @1);
8075			}
8076		;
8077
8078grant_role_opt_value:
8079		OPTION			{ $$ = (Node *) makeBoolean(true); }
8080		| TRUE_P		{ $$ = (Node *) makeBoolean(true); }
8081		| FALSE_P		{ $$ = (Node *) makeBoolean(false); }
8082		;
8083
8084opt_granted_by: GRANTED BY RoleSpec						{ $$ = $3; }
8085			| /*EMPTY*/									{ $$ = NULL; }
8086		;
8087
8088/*****************************************************************************
8089 *
8090 * ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES statement
8091 *
8092 *****************************************************************************/
8093
8094AlterDefaultPrivilegesStmt:
8095			ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES DefACLOptionList DefACLAction
8096				{
8097					AlterDefaultPrivilegesStmt *n = makeNode(AlterDefaultPrivilegesStmt);
8098
8099					n->options = $4;
8100					n->action = (GrantStmt *) $5;
8101					$$ = (Node *) n;
8102				}
8103		;
8104
8105DefACLOptionList:
8106			DefACLOptionList DefACLOption			{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
8107			| /* EMPTY */							{ $$ = NIL; }
8108		;
8109
8110DefACLOption:
8111			IN_P SCHEMA name_list
8112				{
8113					$$ = makeDefElem("schemas", (Node *) $3, @1);
8114				}
8115			| FOR ROLE role_list
8116				{
8117					$$ = makeDefElem("roles", (Node *) $3, @1);
8118				}
8119			| FOR USER role_list
8120				{
8121					$$ = makeDefElem("roles", (Node *) $3, @1);
8122				}
8123		;
8124
8125/*
8126 * This should match GRANT/REVOKE, except that individual target objects
8127 * are not mentioned and we only allow a subset of object types.
8128 */
8129DefACLAction:
8130			GRANT privileges ON defacl_privilege_target TO grantee_list
8131			opt_grant_grant_option
8132				{
8133					GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
8134
8135					n->is_grant = true;
8136					n->privileges = $2;
8137					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_DEFAULTS;
8138					n->objtype = $4;
8139					n->objects = NIL;
8140					n->grantees = $6;
8141					n->grant_option = $7;
8142					$$ = (Node *) n;
8143				}
8144			| REVOKE privileges ON defacl_privilege_target
8145			FROM grantee_list opt_drop_behavior
8146				{
8147					GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
8148
8149					n->is_grant = false;
8150					n->grant_option = false;
8151					n->privileges = $2;
8152					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_DEFAULTS;
8153					n->objtype = $4;
8154					n->objects = NIL;
8155					n->grantees = $6;
8156					n->behavior = $7;
8157					$$ = (Node *) n;
8158				}
8159			| REVOKE GRANT OPTION FOR privileges ON defacl_privilege_target
8160			FROM grantee_list opt_drop_behavior
8161				{
8162					GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
8163
8164					n->is_grant = false;
8165					n->grant_option = true;
8166					n->privileges = $5;
8167					n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_DEFAULTS;
8168					n->objtype = $7;
8169					n->objects = NIL;
8170					n->grantees = $9;
8171					n->behavior = $10;
8172					$$ = (Node *) n;
8173				}
8174		;
8175
8176defacl_privilege_target:
8177			TABLES			{ $$ = OBJECT_TABLE; }
8178			| FUNCTIONS		{ $$ = OBJECT_FUNCTION; }
8179			| ROUTINES		{ $$ = OBJECT_FUNCTION; }
8180			| SEQUENCES		{ $$ = OBJECT_SEQUENCE; }
8181			| TYPES_P		{ $$ = OBJECT_TYPE; }
8182			| SCHEMAS		{ $$ = OBJECT_SCHEMA; }
8183			| LARGE_P OBJECTS_P	{ $$ = OBJECT_LARGEOBJECT; }
8184		;
8185
8186
8187/*****************************************************************************
8188 *
8189 *		QUERY: CREATE INDEX
8190 *
8191 * Note: we cannot put TABLESPACE clause after WHERE clause unless we are
8192 * willing to make TABLESPACE a fully reserved word.
8193 *****************************************************************************/
8194
8195IndexStmt:	CREATE opt_unique INDEX opt_concurrently opt_single_name
8196			ON relation_expr access_method_clause '(' index_params ')'
8197			opt_include opt_unique_null_treatment opt_reloptions OptTableSpace where_clause
8198				{
8199					IndexStmt *n = makeNode(IndexStmt);
8200
8201					n->unique = $2;
8202					n->concurrent = $4;
8203					n->idxname = $5;
8204					n->relation = $7;
8205					n->accessMethod = $8;
8206					n->indexParams = $10;
8207					n->indexIncludingParams = $12;
8208					n->nulls_not_distinct = !$13;
8209					n->options = $14;
8210					n->tableSpace = $15;
8211					n->whereClause = $16;
8212					n->excludeOpNames = NIL;
8213					n->idxcomment = NULL;
8214					n->indexOid = InvalidOid;
8215					n->oldNumber = InvalidRelFileNumber;
8216					n->oldCreateSubid = InvalidSubTransactionId;
8217					n->oldFirstRelfilelocatorSubid = InvalidSubTransactionId;
8218					n->primary = false;
8219					n->isconstraint = false;
8220					n->deferrable = false;
8221					n->initdeferred = false;
8222					n->transformed = false;
8223					n->if_not_exists = false;
8224					n->reset_default_tblspc = false;
8225					$$ = (Node *) n;
8226				}
8227			| CREATE opt_unique INDEX opt_concurrently IF_P NOT EXISTS name
8228			ON relation_expr access_method_clause '(' index_params ')'
8229			opt_include opt_unique_null_treatment opt_reloptions OptTableSpace where_clause
8230				{
8231					IndexStmt *n = makeNode(IndexStmt);
8232
8233					n->unique = $2;
8234					n->concurrent = $4;
8235					n->idxname = $8;
8236					n->relation = $10;
8237					n->accessMethod = $11;
8238					n->indexParams = $13;
8239					n->indexIncludingParams = $15;
8240					n->nulls_not_distinct = !$16;
8241					n->options = $17;
8242					n->tableSpace = $18;
8243					n->whereClause = $19;
8244					n->excludeOpNames = NIL;
8245					n->idxcomment = NULL;
8246					n->indexOid = InvalidOid;
8247					n->oldNumber = InvalidRelFileNumber;
8248					n->oldCreateSubid = InvalidSubTransactionId;
8249					n->oldFirstRelfilelocatorSubid = InvalidSubTransactionId;
8250					n->primary = false;
8251					n->isconstraint = false;
8252					n->deferrable = false;
8253					n->initdeferred = false;
8254					n->transformed = false;
8255					n->if_not_exists = true;
